message.content:
I need to understand the current neuron/Trainium-related code in this project. Please explore:

1. All files in bash/neuron/ - these are shell scripts for compiling and serving models on neuron
2. search_agent/neuron_vllm_launcher.py - the vLLM launcher for neuron
3. search_agent/neuron_embedding_server.py - the embedding server for neuron
4. search_agent/planning_endpoint_pool.py - endpoint pool management
5. tests/test_neuron_vllm_launcher.py and tests/test_neuron_throughput.py

I want to understand:
- How models are currently compiled for neuron (what compile scripts do)
- How vLLM is launched on neuron (the launcher logic)
- How the endpoint pool works
- What the current architecture looks like (topology, tensor parallelism, etc.)
- Any references to specific vLLM versions or neuron SDK versions

Be very thorough - read the full content of these files.

- caveman: Ultra-compressed communication mode. Cuts token usage ~75% by dropping filler, articles, and pleasantries while keeping full technical accuracy. Use when user says "caveman mode", "talk like caveman", "use caveman", "less tokens", "be brief", or invokes /caveman.
- diagnose: Disciplined diagnosis loop for hard bugs and performance regressions. Reproduce → minimise → hypothesise → instrument → fix → regression-test. Use when user says "diagnose this" / "debug this", reports a bug, says something is broken/throwing/failing, or describes a performance regression.
- grill-me: Interview the user relentlessly about a plan or design until reaching shared understanding, resolving each branch of the decision tree. Use when user wants to stress-test a plan, get grilled on their design, or mentions "grill me".
- grill-with-docs: Grilling session that challenges your plan against the existing domain model, sharpens terminology, and updates documentation (CONTEXT.md, ADRs) inline as decisions crystallise. Use when user wants to stress-test a plan against their project's language and documented decisions.
- handoff: Compact the current conversation into a handoff document for another agent to pick up.
- improve-codebase-architecture: Find deepening opportunities in a codebase, informed by the domain language in CONTEXT.md and the decisions in docs/adr/. Use when the user wants to improve architecture, find refactoring opportunities, consolidate tightly-coupled modules, or make a codebase more testable and AI-navigable.
- prototype: Build a throwaway prototype to flesh out a design before committing to it. Routes between two branches — a runnable terminal app for state/business-logic questions, or several radically different UI variations toggleable from one route. Use when the user wants to prototype, sanity-check a data model or state machine, mock up a UI, explore design options, or says "prototype this", "let me play with it", "try a few designs".
- tdd: Test-driven development with red-green-refactor loop. Use when user wants to build features or fix bugs using TDD, mentions "red-green-refactor", wants integration tests, or asks for test-first development.
- to-prd: Turn the current conversation context into a PRD and publish it to the project issue tracker. Use when user wants to create a PRD from the current context.
- triage: Triage issues through a state machine driven by triage roles. Use when user wants to create an issue, triage issues, review incoming bugs or feature requests, prepare issues for an AFK agent, or manage issue workflow.
- write-a-skill: Create new agent skills with proper structure, progressive disclosure, and bundled resources. Use when user wants to create, write, or build a new skill.
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- dataviz: Use this skill whenever you are about to create ANY chart, graph, plot, dashboard, or data visualization, in ANY output medium — an HTML or React artifact, inline SVG, plotting code in any library (matplotlib, plotly, d3, Recharts, …), an image/PNG you will render and upload, or a chart shared into Slack. Read it BEFORE writing the first line of chart code, choosing chart colors, building a stat tile / meter / KPI row, or laying out a dashboard. Produces visualizations that read as one system — elegant, accessible, consistent in light and dark — using a brand-neutral placeholder palette you swap for your own. Teaches a design-system-agnostic method: a form heuristic, a color formula with a runnable validator, mark specs, and interaction rules. A validated default palette is documented in `references/palette.md` — swap that file's values for your brand's. Triggers on: "chart", "graph", "plot", "data viz", "visualization", "dashboard", "analytics", "visualize data", "categorical colors", "sequential / diverging palette", "stat tile", "sparkline", "heatmap", "legend", "axis", "tooltip", "chart colors", "color by series".
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a GitHub pull request; for your working diff use /code-review
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

1	#!/usr/bin/env bash
2	set -euo pipefail
3	
4	SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
5	REPO_ROOT="$(cd -- "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"
6	MODEL="${MODEL:-Qwen/Qwen3-32B}"

12	NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_HIGH="${NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_HIGH:-1750G}"
13	NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_MAX="${NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_MAX:-1900G}"

32	
33	cleanup() {

62	        -p "MemoryHigh=$NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_HIGH" \

113	    if not (model_dir / shard).is_file()

115	if missing:
116	    raise SystemExit(f"Missing {len(missing)} weight shards; first: {missing[0]}")
117	PY
118

121	    echo "A server is already responding at $READINESS_URL." >&2

139	echo "NxD HLO compile workers: $NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS"
140	echo "Visible NeuronCores: $NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES"
141	echo "Compile work directory: $BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR"
142	echo "Compiler cache: $NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL"
143	echo "Compile memory limits: high=$NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_HIGH max=$NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_MAX"
144	echo "Multi-instance shared weights: $NEURON_RT_MULTI_INSTANCE_SHARED_WEIGHTS"
145	echo "Compiled artifact: $COMPILED_MODEL_DIR"

147	    echo "Compile-only mode: skip Neuron device load, warmup, and HTTP readiness."
148	fi

150	
151	COMPILE_ONLY_MARKER="$LOG_DIR/compile-only.complete"

153	MODEL="$MODEL" \
154	TOKENIZER="$LOCAL_MODEL_DIR" \
155	HOST=127.0.0.1 \

171	SERVER_PID=$!
172	
173	while true; do
174	    if [[ "$NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY" == "1" ]]; then
175	        [[ -f "$COMPILE_ONLY_MARKER" ]] && break
176	    elif curl -fsS "$READINESS_URL" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
177	        break
178	    fi
179	    if ! kill -0 "$SERVER_PID" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
180	        set +e
181	        wait "$SERVER_PID"
182	        status=$?
183	        set -e
184	        SERVER_PID=""

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
REPO_ROOT="$(cd -- "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"
MODEL="${MODEL:-Qwen/Qwen3-32B}"
LOCAL_MODEL_DIR="${LOCAL_MODEL_DIR:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/Qwen/Qwen3-32B}"
PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-$REPO_ROOT/.venv-neuron/bin/python}"
PORT="${PORT:-8032}"
TP_SIZE="${TP_SIZE:-4}"
NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS="${NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS:-2}"
NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_HIGH="${NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_HIGH:-1750G}"
NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_MAX="${NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_MAX:-1900G}"
NEURON_COMPILE_USE_SYSTEMD_SCOPE="${NEURON_COMPILE_USE_SYSTEMD_SCOPE:-1}"
BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR="${BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compile-work/qwen3-32b-judge}"
NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL="${NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compile-cache}"
NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="${NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES:-0-3}"
NEURON_RT_MULTI_INSTANCE_SHARED_WEIGHTS="${NEURON_RT_MULTI_INSTANCE_SHARED_WEIGHTS:-TRUE}"
OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG="${OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG:-}"
COMPILED_MODEL_DIR="${COMPILED_MODEL_DIR:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/qwen3-32b-judge-tp${TP_SIZE}-s8192}"
NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY="${NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY:-1}"
SERVER_PID=""
READINESS_URL="http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/v1/models"

while (( $# > 0 )); do
    case "$1" in
        --compile-only) NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY=1 ;;
        *) echo "Unknown argument: $1" >&2; exit 2 ;;
    esac
    shift
done

cleanup() {
    if [[ -n "$SERVER_PID" ]] && kill -0 "$SERVER_PID" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        kill "$SERVER_PID" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
        wait "$SERVER_PID" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
    fi
}
trap cleanup EXIT
trap 'exit 130' INT TERM

if [[ ! "$NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS" =~ ^[1-9][0-9]*$ ]]; then
    echo "NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS must be a positive integer." >&2
    exit 2
fi
if [[ "$NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY" != "0" && "$NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY" != "1" ]]; then
    echo "NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY must be 0 or 1." >&2
    exit 2
fi
if [[ -z "$OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG" ]]; then
    printf -v OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG \
        '{"enable_bucketing":true,"seq_len":8192,"max_context_length":8192,"save_sharded_checkpoint":true}'
fi


if [[ "$NEURON_COMPILE_USE_SYSTEMD_SCOPE" == "1" && "${NEURON_COMPILE_SCOPE_ACTIVE:-0}" != "1" ]]; then
    if ! command -v systemd-run >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        echo "systemd-run is required for the Neuron compile memory limit." >&2
        exit 1
    fi
    exec systemd-run --user --scope --quiet \
        -p "MemoryHigh=$NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_HIGH" \
        -p "MemoryMax=$NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_MAX" \
        -p MemorySwapMax=0 \
        env \
        NEURON_COMPILE_SCOPE_ACTIVE=1 \
        TP_SIZE="$TP_SIZE" \
        NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS="$NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS" \
        NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_HIGH="$NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_HIGH" \
        NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_MAX="$NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_MAX" \
        NEURON_COMPILE_USE_SYSTEMD_SCOPE="$NEURON_COMPILE_USE_SYSTEMD_SCOPE" \
        BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR="$BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR" \
        NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL="$NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL" \
        NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="$NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES" \
        MODEL="$MODEL" \
        NEURON_RT_MULTI_INSTANCE_SHARED_WEIGHTS="$NEURON_RT_MULTI_INSTANCE_SHARED_WEIGHTS" \
        OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG="$OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG" \
        COMPILED_MODEL_DIR="$COMPILED_MODEL_DIR" \
        NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY="$NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY" \
        LOCAL_MODEL_DIR="$LOCAL_MODEL_DIR" \
        PYTHON_BIN="$PYTHON_BIN" \
        PORT="$PORT" \
        bash "$0"
fi

if [[ ! -x "$PYTHON_BIN" ]]; then
    echo "Missing Neuron Python: $PYTHON_BIN" >&2
    exit 1
fi
if [[ ! -f "$LOCAL_MODEL_DIR/config.json" ]]; then
    echo "Missing Qwen3-32B weights at $LOCAL_MODEL_DIR." >&2
    echo "Run download_qwen3_32b_judge.bash first." >&2
    exit 1
fi
if [[ ! -f "$LOCAL_MODEL_DIR/tokenizer_config.json" ]]; then
    echo "Missing Qwen3-32B tokenizer at $LOCAL_MODEL_DIR." >&2
    echo "Run download_qwen3_32b_judge.bash first." >&2
    exit 1
fi
"$PYTHON_BIN" - "$LOCAL_MODEL_DIR" <<'PY'
import json
import sys
from pathlib import Path

model_dir = Path(sys.argv[1])
index_path = model_dir / "model.safetensors.index.json"
if not index_path.is_file():
    raise SystemExit(f"Missing weight index: {index_path}")
index = json.loads(index_path.read_text())
missing = sorted(
    shard
    for shard in set(index.get("weight_map", {}).values())
    if not (model_dir / shard).is_file()
)
if missing:
    raise SystemExit(f"Missing {len(missing)} weight shards; first: {missing[0]}")
PY

if [[ "$NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY" != "1" ]] \
    && curl -fsS "$READINESS_URL" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "A server is already responding at $READINESS_URL." >&2
    exit 1
fi

LOG_DIR="$REPO_ROOT/logs/neuron-debug/qwen3-32b-judge-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)"
mkdir -p \
    "$LOG_DIR" \
    "$BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR" \
    "${NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL#file://}" \
    "$(dirname -- "$COMPILED_MODEL_DIR")"
exec > >(tee -a "$LOG_DIR/compile.log") 2>&1
exec 9>"$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/.qwen3-32b-judge-compile.lock"
if ! flock -n 9; then
    echo "Another Qwen3-32B judge compilation is already running." >&2
    exit 1
fi

echo "Precompiling Qwen3-32B judge: TP=$TP_SIZE max_len=8192 max_seqs=1"
echo "NxD HLO compile workers: $NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS"
echo "Visible NeuronCores: $NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES"
echo "Compile work directory: $BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR"
echo "Compiler cache: $NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL"
echo "Compile memory limits: high=$NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_HIGH max=$NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_MAX"
echo "Multi-instance shared weights: $NEURON_RT_MULTI_INSTANCE_SHARED_WEIGHTS"
echo "Compiled artifact: $COMPILED_MODEL_DIR"
if [[ "$NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY" == "1" ]]; then
    echo "Compile-only mode: skip Neuron device load, warmup, and HTTP readiness."
fi
echo "Logs: $LOG_DIR"

COMPILE_ONLY_MARKER="$LOG_DIR/compile-only.complete"

MODEL="$MODEL" \
TOKENIZER="$LOCAL_MODEL_DIR" \
HOST=127.0.0.1 \
PORT="$PORT" \
TP_SIZE="$TP_SIZE" \
MAX_MODEL_LEN=8192 \
MAX_NUM_SEQS=1 \
NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS="$NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS" \
BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR="$BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR" \
NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL="$NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL" \
NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="$NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES" \
NEURON_QUARANTINE_INCOMPLETE_ARTIFACTS=1 \
NEURON_RT_MULTI_INSTANCE_SHARED_WEIGHTS="$NEURON_RT_MULTI_INSTANCE_SHARED_WEIGHTS" \
OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG="$OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG" \
NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="$COMPILED_MODEL_DIR" \
NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY="$NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY" \
NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY_MARKER="$COMPILE_ONLY_MARKER" \
    bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_qwen3_32b_judge.bash" &
SERVER_PID=$!

while true; do
    if [[ "$NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY" == "1" ]]; then
        [[ -f "$COMPILE_ONLY_MARKER" ]] && break
    elif curl -fsS "$READINESS_URL" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        break
    fi
    if ! kill -0 "$SERVER_PID" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        set +e
        wait "$SERVER_PID"
        status=$?
        set -e
        SERVER_PID=""
        if [[ "$NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY" == "1" && -f "$COMPILE_ONLY_MARKER" ]]; then
            break
        fi
        if [[ "$status" -eq 0 ]]; then
            status=1
        fi
        echo "Qwen3-32B judge compilation failed before readiness." >&2
        exit "$status"
    fi
    sleep 10
done

for ((rank = 0; rank < TP_SIZE; rank++)); do
    weight_path="$COMPILED_MODEL_DIR/weights/tp${rank}_sharded_checkpoint.safetensors"
    if [[ ! -s "$weight_path" ]]; then
        echo "Missing saved judge weight shard: $weight_path" >&2
        exit 1
    fi
done

if [[ "$NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY" == "1" ]]; then
    echo "Judge artifacts generated successfully; Neuron device load skipped."
else
    echo "Judge artifacts loaded successfully; stopping the temporary server."
fi
cleanup
SERVER_PID=""
echo "Qwen3-32B judge precompilation complete."

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
REPO_ROOT="$(cd -- "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"
VENV_DIR="${VENV_DIR:-$REPO_ROOT/.venv-neuron-embedding}"
MODEL="${MODEL:-Qwen/Qwen3-Embedding-8B}"
LOCAL_MODEL_DIR="${LOCAL_MODEL_DIR:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/Qwen/Qwen3-Embedding-8B}"
COMPILED_MODEL_DIR="${COMPILED_MODEL_DIR:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/qwen3-embedding-8b-tp8-b2-s1024}"
BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR="${BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compile-work/qwen3-embedding}"
NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL="${NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compile-cache}"
NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="${NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES:-56-63}"
NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_HIGH="${NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_HIGH:-1750G}"
NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_MAX="${NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_MAX:-1900G}"
NEURON_COMPILE_USE_SYSTEMD_SCOPE="${NEURON_COMPILE_USE_SYSTEMD_SCOPE:-1}"
NEURON_RT_MULTI_INSTANCE_SHARED_WEIGHTS="${NEURON_RT_MULTI_INSTANCE_SHARED_WEIGHTS:-TRUE}"

if [[ "$NEURON_COMPILE_USE_SYSTEMD_SCOPE" == "1" && "${NEURON_COMPILE_SCOPE_ACTIVE:-0}" != "1" ]]; then
    exec systemd-run --user --scope --quiet \
        -p "MemoryHigh=$NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_HIGH" \
        -p "MemoryMax=$NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_MAX" \
        -p MemorySwapMax=0 \
        env \
        NEURON_COMPILE_SCOPE_ACTIVE=1 \
        NEURON_COMPILE_USE_SYSTEMD_SCOPE="$NEURON_COMPILE_USE_SYSTEMD_SCOPE" \
        NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_HIGH="$NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_HIGH" \
        NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_MAX="$NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_MAX" \
        NEURON_RT_MULTI_INSTANCE_SHARED_WEIGHTS="$NEURON_RT_MULTI_INSTANCE_SHARED_WEIGHTS" \
        BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR="$BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR" \
        NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL="$NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL" \
        NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="$NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES" \
        VENV_DIR="$VENV_DIR" \
        MODEL="$MODEL" \
        LOCAL_MODEL_DIR="$LOCAL_MODEL_DIR" \
        COMPILED_MODEL_DIR="$COMPILED_MODEL_DIR" \
        bash "$0" "$@"
fi

if [[ ! -x "$VENV_DIR/bin/optimum-cli" ]]; then
    echo "Missing $VENV_DIR/bin/optimum-cli; run setup_qwen3_embedding_env.bash first." >&2
    exit 1
fi
if [[ ! -f "$LOCAL_MODEL_DIR/config.json" ]]; then
    echo "Missing Qwen3 embedding weights at $LOCAL_MODEL_DIR." >&2
    echo "Run download_qwen3_embedding.bash first." >&2
    exit 1
fi
if [[ -f "$COMPILED_MODEL_DIR/.compile-complete" ]]; then
    echo "Compiled embedding artifact already exists: $COMPILED_MODEL_DIR"
    exit 0
fi
if [[ -n "$(find "$COMPILED_MODEL_DIR" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -print -quit 2>/dev/null)" ]]; then
    failed_dir="$COMPILED_MODEL_DIR.failed-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)"
    mv -- "$COMPILED_MODEL_DIR" "$failed_dir"
    echo "Moved incomplete embedding artifact to: $failed_dir"
fi

LOG_DIR="$REPO_ROOT/logs/neuron-debug/qwen3-embedding-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)"
mkdir -p \
    "$LOG_DIR" \
    "$BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR" \
    "${NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL#file://}" \
    "$(dirname -- "$COMPILED_MODEL_DIR")"
exec > >(tee -a "$LOG_DIR/compile.log") 2>&1
exec 9>"$(dirname -- "$COMPILED_MODEL_DIR")/.qwen3-embedding-compile.lock"
if ! flock -n 9; then
    echo "Another Qwen3 embedding compilation is already running." >&2
    exit 1
fi

export BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR
export NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL
export NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES
export NEURON_RT_MULTI_INSTANCE_SHARED_WEIGHTS
export PATH="$VENV_DIR/bin:$PATH"

echo "Compiling Qwen3-Embedding-8B: TP=8 batch=2 sequence_length=1024"
echo "Visible NeuronCores: $NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES"
echo "Compile work directory: $BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR"
echo "Compiler cache: $NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL"
echo "Multi-instance shared weights: $NEURON_RT_MULTI_INSTANCE_SHARED_WEIGHTS"
echo "Compile memory limits: high=$NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_HIGH max=$NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_MAX"
echo "Logs: $LOG_DIR"

"$VENV_DIR/bin/optimum-cli" export neuron \
    --model "$LOCAL_MODEL_DIR" \
    --task feature-extraction \
    --batch_size 2 \
    --sequence_length 1024 \
    --auto_cast matmul \
    --instance_type trn2 \
    --tensor_parallel_size 8 \
    "$COMPILED_MODEL_DIR"

for rank in {0..7}; do
    weight_path="$COMPILED_MODEL_DIR/checkpoint/weights/tp${rank}_sharded_checkpoint.safetensors"
    if [[ ! -s "$weight_path" ]]; then
        echo "Missing saved embedding weight shard: $weight_path" >&2
        exit 1
    fi
done

touch "$COMPILED_MODEL_DIR/.compile-complete"
echo "Embedding compilation complete: $COMPILED_MODEL_DIR"

1	#!/usr/bin/env bash
2	set -euo pipefail
3	
4	SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
5	REPO_ROOT="$(cd -- "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"
6	PORT="${PORT:-6008}"
7	NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS="${NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS:-16}"
8	TP_SIZE="${TP_SIZE:-8}"
9	MAX_MODEL_LEN="${MAX_MODEL_LEN:-128000}"
10	MAX_NUM_SEQS="${MAX_NUM_SEQS:-2}"
11	COMPILE_CONTEXT_BUCKETS="${COMPILE_CONTEXT_BUCKETS:-16384}"
12	COMPILE_PREFIX_BUCKETS="${COMPILE_PREFIX_BUCKETS:-114688}"
13	COMPILE_GENERATION_BUCKETS="${COMPILE_GENERATION_BUCKETS:-16384,32768,65536,98304,128000}"
14	OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG="${OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG:-}"
15	NEURON_LOGICAL_NC_CONFIG="${NEURON_LOGICAL_NC_CONFIG:-2}"
16	NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_HIGH="${NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_HIGH:-1750G}"
17	NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_MAX="${NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_MAX:-1900G}"
18	NEURON_COMPILE_USE_SYSTEMD_SCOPE="${NEURON_COMPILE_USE_SYSTEMD_SCOPE:-1}"
19	BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR="${BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compile-work/tongyi-128k-prefix112-tp8}"
20	NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL="${NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compile-cache/tongyi-128k-prefix112-tp8}"
21	NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="${NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES:-0-7}"
22	COMPILE_LOCK_FILE="${COMPILE_LOCK_FILE:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/.tongyi-128k-prefix112-tp8.compile.lock}"
23	LOG_TAG="${LOG_TAG:-tongyi-128k-prefix112-tp8}"
24	NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY="${NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY:-0}"
25	KERNEL_LOG_PID=""
26	SERVER_PID=""
27	READINESS_URL="http://127.0.0.1:${PORT}/v1/models"
28	
29	while (( $# > 0 )); do
30	    case "$1" in
31	        --compile-only) NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY=1 ;;
32	        *) echo "Unknown argument: $1" >&2; exit 2 ;;
33	    esac
34	    shift
35	done
36	
37	if [[ -z "$OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG" ]]; then
38	    printf -v OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG \
39	        '{"enable_bucketing":true,"seq_len":%s,"max_context_length":%s,"context_encoding_buckets":[%s],"prefix_buckets":[%s],"token_generation_buckets":[%s],"save_sharded_checkpoint":true,"blockwise_matmul_config":{"use_shard_on_intermediate_dynamic_while":true}}' \
40	        "$MAX_MODEL_LEN" "$MAX_MODEL_LEN" "$COMPILE_CONTEXT_BUCKETS" \
41	        "$COMPILE_PREFIX_BUCKETS" "$COMPILE_GENERATION_BUCKETS"
42	fi
43	
44	quarantine_failed_compiler_cache() {
45	    local cache_root="${NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL#file://}"
46	    local quarantine_root=""
47	    local module_dir cache_namespace lock_file first_log_line lock_fd
48	
49	    [[ -d "$cache_root" ]] || return 0
50	
51	    while IFS= read -r -d '' module_dir; do
52	        [[ -f "$module_dir/model.neff" ]] && continue
53	
54	        lock_file="$module_dir/model.hlo_module.pb.lock"
55	        lock_fd=""
56	        if [[ -f "$lock_file" ]]; then
57	            exec {lock_fd}>"$lock_file"
58	            if ! flock -n "$lock_fd"; then
59	                exec {lock_fd}>&-
60	                continue
61	            fi
62	        fi
63	
64	        first_log_line=""
65	        if [[ -f "$module_dir/model.log" ]]; then
66	            IFS= read -r first_log_line < "$module_dir/model.log" || true
67	        fi
68	        if [[ ! -f "$lock_file" && "$first_log_line" != "Failed compilation"* ]]; then
69	            continue
70	        fi
71	
72	        if [[ -z "$quarantine_root" ]]; then
73	            quarantine_root="$cache_root.failed-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)"
74	        fi
75	        cache_namespace="$(basename -- "$(dirname -- "$module_dir")")"
76	        mkdir -p "$quarantine_root/$cache_namespace"
77	        mv -- "$module_dir" "$quarantine_root/$cache_namespace/"
78	        echo "Quarantined failed compiler cache: $module_dir"
79	
80	        if [[ -n "$lock_fd" ]]; then
81	            exec {lock_fd}>&-
82	        fi
83	    done < <(
84	        find "$cache_root" -mindepth 2 -maxdepth 2 -type d \
85	            -name 'MODULE_*' -print0
86	    )
87	
88	    if [[ -n "$quarantine_root" ]]; then

file.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
REPO_ROOT="$(cd -- "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"
PORT="${PORT:-6008}"
NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS="${NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS:-16}"
TP_SIZE="${TP_SIZE:-8}"
MAX_MODEL_LEN="${MAX_MODEL_LEN:-128000}"
MAX_NUM_SEQS="${MAX_NUM_SEQS:-2}"
COMPILE_CONTEXT_BUCKETS="${COMPILE_CONTEXT_BUCKETS:-16384}"
COMPILE_PREFIX_BUCKETS="${COMPILE_PREFIX_BUCKETS:-114688}"
COMPILE_GENERATION_BUCKETS="${COMPILE_GENERATION_BUCKETS:-16384,32768,65536,98304,128000}"
OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG="${OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG:-}"
NEURON_LOGICAL_NC_CONFIG="${NEURON_LOGICAL_NC_CONFIG:-2}"
NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_HIGH="${NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_HIGH:-1750G}"
NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_MAX="${NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_MAX:-1900G}"
NEURON_COMPILE_USE_SYSTEMD_SCOPE="${NEURON_COMPILE_USE_SYSTEMD_SCOPE:-1}"
BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR="${BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compile-work/tongyi-128k-prefix112-tp8}"
NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL="${NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compile-cache/tongyi-128k-prefix112-tp8}"
NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="${NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES:-0-7}"
COMPILE_LOCK_FILE="${COMPILE_LOCK_FILE:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/.tongyi-128k-prefix112-tp8.compile.lock}"
LOG_TAG="${LOG_TAG:-tongyi-128k-prefix112-tp8}"
NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY="${NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY:-0}"
KERNEL_LOG_PID=""
SERVER_PID=""
READINESS_URL="http://127.0.0.1:${PORT}/v1/models"

while (( $# > 0 )); do
    case "$1" in
        --compile-only) NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY=1 ;;
        *) echo "Unknown argument: $1" >&2; exit 2 ;;
    esac
    shift
done

if [[ -z "$OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG" ]]; then
    printf -v OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG \
        '{"enable_bucketing":true,"seq_len":%s,"max_context_length":%s,"context_encoding_buckets":[%s],"prefix_buckets":[%s],"token_generation_buckets":[%s],"save_sharded_checkpoint":true,"blockwise_matmul_config":{"use_shard_on_intermediate_dynamic_while":true}}' \
        "$MAX_MODEL_LEN" "$MAX_MODEL_LEN" "$COMPILE_CONTEXT_BUCKETS" \
        "$COMPILE_PREFIX_BUCKETS" "$COMPILE_GENERATION_BUCKETS"
fi

quarantine_failed_compiler_cache() {
    local cache_root="${NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL#file://}"
    local quarantine_root=""
    local module_dir cache_namespace lock_file first_log_line lock_fd

    [[ -d "$cache_root" ]] || return 0

    while IFS= read -r -d '' module_dir; do
        [[ -f "$module_dir/model.neff" ]] && continue

        lock_file="$module_dir/model.hlo_module.pb.lock"
        lock_fd=""
        if [[ -f "$lock_file" ]]; then
            exec {lock_fd}>"$lock_file"
            if ! flock -n "$lock_fd"; then
                exec {lock_fd}>&-
                continue
            fi
        fi

        first_log_line=""
        if [[ -f "$module_dir/model.log" ]]; then
            IFS= read -r first_log_line < "$module_dir/model.log" || true
        fi
        if [[ ! -f "$lock_file" && "$first_log_line" != "Failed compilation"* ]]; then
            continue
        fi

        if [[ -z "$quarantine_root" ]]; then
            quarantine_root="$cache_root.failed-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)"
        fi
        cache_namespace="$(basename -- "$(dirname -- "$module_dir")")"
        mkdir -p "$quarantine_root/$cache_namespace"
        mv -- "$module_dir" "$quarantine_root/$cache_namespace/"
        echo "Quarantined failed compiler cache: $module_dir"

        if [[ -n "$lock_fd" ]]; then
            exec {lock_fd}>&-
        fi
    done < <(
        find "$cache_root" -mindepth 2 -maxdepth 2 -type d \
            -name 'MODULE_*' -print0
    )

    if [[ -n "$quarantine_root" ]]; then
        echo "Failed compiler caches moved to: $quarantine_root"
    fi
}

cleanup() {
    if [[ -n "$SERVER_PID" ]] && kill -0 "$SERVER_PID" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        kill "$SERVER_PID" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
        wait "$SERVER_PID" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
    fi
    if [[ -n "$KERNEL_LOG_PID" ]] && kill -0 "$KERNEL_LOG_PID" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        kill "$KERNEL_LOG_PID" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
        wait "$KERNEL_LOG_PID" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
    fi
}
trap cleanup EXIT
trap 'exit 130' INT TERM

if [[ ! "$NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS" =~ ^[1-9][0-9]*$ ]]; then
    echo "NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS must be a positive integer." >&2
    exit 2
fi
if [[ "$NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY" != "0" && "$NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY" != "1" ]]; then
    echo "NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY must be 0 or 1." >&2
    exit 2
fi

if [[ "$NEURON_COMPILE_USE_SYSTEMD_SCOPE" == "1" && "${NEURON_COMPILE_SCOPE_ACTIVE:-0}" != "1" ]]; then
    if ! command -v systemd-run >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        echo "systemd-run is required for the Neuron compile memory limit." >&2
        echo "Set NEURON_COMPILE_USE_SYSTEMD_SCOPE=0 only if another cgroup limit is active." >&2
        exit 1
    fi
    exec systemd-run --user --scope --quiet \
        -p "MemoryHigh=$NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_HIGH" \
        -p "MemoryMax=$NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_MAX" \
        -p MemorySwapMax=0 \
        env \
        NEURON_COMPILE_SCOPE_ACTIVE=1 \
        NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS="$NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS" \
        TP_SIZE="$TP_SIZE" \
        COMPILE_CONTEXT_BUCKETS="$COMPILE_CONTEXT_BUCKETS" \
        COMPILE_PREFIX_BUCKETS="$COMPILE_PREFIX_BUCKETS" \
        COMPILE_GENERATION_BUCKETS="$COMPILE_GENERATION_BUCKETS" \
        MAX_MODEL_LEN="$MAX_MODEL_LEN" \
        MAX_NUM_SEQS="$MAX_NUM_SEQS" \
        NEURON_SCHEDULER="${NEURON_SCHEDULER:-custom}" \
        ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL="${ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL:-}" \
        MAX_NUM_BATCHED_TOKENS="${MAX_NUM_BATCHED_TOKENS:-}" \
        EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS="${EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS:-}" \
        XLA_HANDLE_SPECIAL_SCALAR="${XLA_HANDLE_SPECIAL_SCALAR:-}" \
        UNSAFE_FP8FNCAST="${UNSAFE_FP8FNCAST:-}" \
        NEURON_LOGICAL_NC_CONFIG="$NEURON_LOGICAL_NC_CONFIG" \
        NEURON_CACHE_TAG="${NEURON_CACHE_TAG:-default}" \
        OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG="$OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG" \
        NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_HIGH="$NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_HIGH" \
        NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_MAX="$NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_MAX" \
        NEURON_COMPILE_USE_SYSTEMD_SCOPE="$NEURON_COMPILE_USE_SYSTEMD_SCOPE" \
        BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR="$BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR" \
        NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL="$NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL" \
        NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="$NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES" \
        COMPILE_LOCK_FILE="$COMPILE_LOCK_FILE" \
        LOG_TAG="$LOG_TAG" \
        NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY="$NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY" \
        PORT="$PORT" \
        bash "$0"
fi

LOG_DIR="$REPO_ROOT/logs/neuron-debug/$LOG_TAG-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)"
mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"
exec > >(tee -a "$LOG_DIR/compile.log") 2>&1
journalctl -kf -o short-iso > "$LOG_DIR/kernel.log" 2>&1 &
KERNEL_LOG_PID=$!
printf '%s\n' "$$" > "$LOG_DIR/compile.pid"
printf '%s\n' "$KERNEL_LOG_PID" > "$LOG_DIR/kernel.pid"
COMPILE_ONLY_MARKER="$LOG_DIR/compile-only.complete"
echo "Neuron compile logs: $LOG_DIR"

mkdir -p \
    "$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts" \
    "$BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR" \
    "${NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL#file://}"
exec 9>"$COMPILE_LOCK_FILE"
if ! flock -n 9; then
    echo "Another Tongyi precompilation is already running." >&2
    exit 1
fi

quarantine_failed_compiler_cache

if [[ "$NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY" != "1" ]] && curl -fsS "$READINESS_URL" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "A vLLM server is already responding at $READINESS_URL." >&2
    echo "Stop it or set PORT to an unused port before precompiling." >&2
    exit 1
fi

echo "Precompiling Tongyi: TP=$TP_SIZE max_len=$MAX_MODEL_LEN max_seqs=$MAX_NUM_SEQS"
echo "Neuron scheduler: ${NEURON_SCHEDULER:-custom} (chunked_prefill=${ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL:-default}, max_batched_tokens=${MAX_NUM_BATCHED_TOKENS:-default})"
echo "Compile buckets: context=[$COMPILE_CONTEXT_BUCKETS] prefix=[$COMPILE_PREFIX_BUCKETS] generation=[$COMPILE_GENERATION_BUCKETS]"
echo "Visible NeuronCores: $NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES"
echo "Compile work directory: $BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR"
echo "Compiler cache: $NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL"
echo "NxD HLO compile workers: $NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS"
if [[ "$NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY" == "1" ]]; then
    echo "Compile-only mode: skip Neuron device load, warmup, and HTTP readiness."
fi
if [[ "$NEURON_COMPILE_USE_SYSTEMD_SCOPE" == "1" ]]; then
    echo "Compile memory limits: high=$NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_HIGH max=$NEURON_COMPILE_MEMORY_MAX"
fi
if [[ "$NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY" == "1" ]]; then
    echo "The compiler EngineCore will exit after artifact generation succeeds."
else
    echo "The temporary server will stop after compilation and load validation succeed."
fi

HOST=127.0.0.1 \
PORT="$PORT" \
BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR="$BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR" \
NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL="$NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL" \
NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="$NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES" \
NEURON_LOGICAL_NC_CONFIG="$NEURON_LOGICAL_NC_CONFIG" \
NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS="$NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS" \
NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY="$NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY" \
NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY_MARKER="$COMPILE_ONLY_MARKER" \
TP_SIZE="$TP_SIZE" \
MAX_MODEL_LEN="$MAX_MODEL_LEN" \
MAX_NUM_SEQS="$MAX_NUM_SEQS" \
OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG="$OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG" \
NEURON_QUARANTINE_INCOMPLETE_ARTIFACTS=1 \
    bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi.bash" &
SERVER_PID=$!

while true; do
    if [[ "$NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY" == "1" ]]; then
        [[ -f "$COMPILE_ONLY_MARKER" ]] && break
    elif curl -fsS "$READINESS_URL" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        break
    fi
    if ! kill -0 "$SERVER_PID" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        set +e
        wait "$SERVER_PID"
        status=$?
        set -e
        SERVER_PID=""
        if [[ "$NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY" == "1" && -f "$COMPILE_ONLY_MARKER" ]]; then
            break
        fi
        if [[ "$status" -eq 0 ]]; then
            status=1
        fi
        echo "Tongyi precompilation failed before the server became ready." >&2
        exit "$status"
    fi
    sleep 10
done

if [[ "$NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY" == "1" ]]; then
    echo "Compilation artifacts generated successfully; Neuron device load skipped."
else
    echo "Compilation artifacts loaded successfully; stopping the temporary server."
fi
cleanup
SERVER_PID=""

artifact_path="$(sed -n 's/^Neuron compiled artifacts: \([^ ]*\) .*/\1/p' "$LOG_DIR/compile.log" | tail -n 1)"
if [[ -n "$artifact_path" && -f "$artifact_path/model.pt" ]]; then
    printf '%s\n' "$artifact_path" > "$LOG_DIR/compiled_artifact_path"
    echo "Compiled artifact path: $artifact_path"
    echo "Artifact path file: $LOG_DIR/compiled_artifact_path"
else
    echo "WARNING: compilation completed but no complete model.pt artifact path was found in $LOG_DIR/compile.log." >&2
fi

echo "Precompilation complete. Start the server with:"
echo "  bash bash/neuron/serve_tongyi.bash"

1	#!/usr/bin/env bash
2	set -euo pipefail
3	
4	SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
5	REPO_ROOT="$(cd -- "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"
6	
7	export PORT="${PORT:-6016}"
8	export TP_SIZE="${TP_SIZE:-16}"
9	export NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS="${NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS:-16}"
10	export MAX_MODEL_LEN="${MAX_MODEL_LEN:-128000}"
11	export MAX_NUM_SEQS="${MAX_NUM_SEQS:-2}"
12	export COMPILE_CONTEXT_BUCKETS="${COMPILE_CONTEXT_BUCKETS:-16384}"
13	export COMPILE_PREFIX_BUCKETS="${COMPILE_PREFIX_BUCKETS:-114688}"
14	export COMPILE_GENERATION_BUCKETS="${COMPILE_GENERATION_BUCKETS:-16384,32768,65536,98304,128000}"
15	export NEURON_SCHEDULER="${NEURON_SCHEDULER:-custom}"
16	
17	case "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" in
18	    custom)
19	        compile_profile="tongyi-128k-prefix112-tp16"
20	        ;;
21	    native)
22	        # Keep the native/chunked experiment completely separate from the
23	        # production custom-scheduler cache and compile lock.
24	        compile_profile="tongyi-128k-prefix112-tp16-native-chunked"
25	        export ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL="${ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL:-1}"
26	        export MAX_NUM_BATCHED_TOKENS="${MAX_NUM_BATCHED_TOKENS:-16384}"
27	        export NEURON_CACHE_TAG="${NEURON_CACHE_TAG:-tongyi-tp16-native-chunked-v1}"
28	        ;;
29	    *)
30	        echo "NEURON_SCHEDULER must be custom or native" >&2
31	        exit 2
32	        ;;
33	esac
34	
35	export BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR="${BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compile-work/$compile_profile}"
36	export NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL="${NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compile-cache/$compile_profile}"
37	export NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="${NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES:-8-23}"
38	export COMPILE_LOCK_FILE="${COMPILE_LOCK_FILE:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/.$compile_profile.compile.lock}"
39	export LOG_TAG="${LOG_TAG:-$compile_profile}"
40	
41	bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/compile_tongyi.bash" "$@"
42	
43	echo "To run the TP=16 artifact:"
44	echo "  bash bash/neuron/serve_tongyi_tp16.bash"
45

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
REPO_ROOT="$(cd -- "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"

export PORT="${PORT:-6016}"
export TP_SIZE="${TP_SIZE:-16}"
export NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS="${NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS:-16}"
export MAX_MODEL_LEN="${MAX_MODEL_LEN:-128000}"
export MAX_NUM_SEQS="${MAX_NUM_SEQS:-2}"
export COMPILE_CONTEXT_BUCKETS="${COMPILE_CONTEXT_BUCKETS:-16384}"
export COMPILE_PREFIX_BUCKETS="${COMPILE_PREFIX_BUCKETS:-114688}"
export COMPILE_GENERATION_BUCKETS="${COMPILE_GENERATION_BUCKETS:-16384,32768,65536,98304,128000}"
export NEURON_SCHEDULER="${NEURON_SCHEDULER:-custom}"

case "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" in
    custom)
        compile_profile="tongyi-128k-prefix112-tp16"
        ;;
    native)
        # Keep the native/chunked experiment completely separate from the
        # production custom-scheduler cache and compile lock.
        compile_profile="tongyi-128k-prefix112-tp16-native-chunked"
        export ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL="${ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL:-1}"
        export MAX_NUM_BATCHED_TOKENS="${MAX_NUM_BATCHED_TOKENS:-16384}"
        export NEURON_CACHE_TAG="${NEURON_CACHE_TAG:-tongyi-tp16-native-chunked-v1}"
        ;;
    *)
        echo "NEURON_SCHEDULER must be custom or native" >&2
        exit 2
        ;;
esac

export BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR="${BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compile-work/$compile_profile}"
export NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL="${NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compile-cache/$compile_profile}"
export NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="${NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES:-8-23}"
export COMPILE_LOCK_FILE="${COMPILE_LOCK_FILE:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/.$compile_profile.compile.lock}"
export LOG_TAG="${LOG_TAG:-$compile_profile}"

bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/compile_tongyi.bash" "$@"

echo "To run the TP=16 artifact:"
echo "  bash bash/neuron/serve_tongyi_tp16.bash"

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
REPO_ROOT="$(cd -- "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"

# TP=8, one 128k sequence is the smallest change from the proven TP=8
# configuration.  The two-sequence profile completes compilation and warmup,
# but vLLM rejects its 23.44 GiB KV-cache request on this Trn2 HBM partition.
export PORT="${PORT:-6008}"
export TP_SIZE="${TP_SIZE:-8}"
export NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS="${NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS:-16}"
export MAX_MODEL_LEN="${MAX_MODEL_LEN:-128000}"
export MAX_NUM_SEQS="${MAX_NUM_SEQS:-1}"
export COMPILE_CONTEXT_BUCKETS="${COMPILE_CONTEXT_BUCKETS:-16384}"
export COMPILE_PREFIX_BUCKETS="${COMPILE_PREFIX_BUCKETS:-114688}"
export COMPILE_GENERATION_BUCKETS="${COMPILE_GENERATION_BUCKETS:-16384,32768,65536,98304,128000}"
export BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR="${BASE_COMPILE_WORK_DIR:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compile-work/tongyi-128k-prefix112-tp8-s1}"
export NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL="${NEURON_COMPILE_CACHE_URL:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compile-cache/tongyi-128k-prefix112-tp8-s1}"
export NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="${NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES:-0-7}"
export COMPILE_LOCK_FILE="${COMPILE_LOCK_FILE:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/.tongyi-128k-prefix112-tp8-s1.compile.lock}"
export LOG_TAG="${LOG_TAG:-tongyi-128k-prefix112-tp8-s1}"
export NEURON_CACHE_TAG="${NEURON_CACHE_TAG:-tongyi-128k-prefix112-tp8-s1}"

bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/compile_tongyi.bash" "$@"

echo "To run the TP=8, 128k, single-sequence artifact:"
echo "  bash bash/neuron/serve_tongyi_tp8_s1.bash"

12	export ENABLE_PREFIX_CACHING="${ENABLE_PREFIX_CACHING:-1}"

16	
17	case "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" in
18	    custom)
19	        export DISABLE_NEURON_CUSTOM_SCHEDULER=0
20	        export ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL="${ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL:-0}"
21	        echo "WARNING: custom Neuron scheduling does not chunk prefill; a cold uncached suffix larger than the compiled context bucket can terminate EngineCore." >&2
22	        ;;
23	    native)
24	        # Native vLLM scheduling is the only Neuron path that retains chunked
25	        # prefill. Validate it with a separate compiled artifact/cache first.
26	        export DISABLE_NEURON_CUSTOM_SCHEDULER=1

31	            echo "MAX_NUM_BATCHED_TOKENS must be in 1..MAX_MODEL_LEN for native scheduling." >&2
32	            exit 2
33	        fi
34	        # vLLM's native default is too small for the compiled 16k uncached
35	        # context bucket. Respect an explicit CLI override when testing a
36	        # different chunk size.
37	        if [[ " ${EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS:-} " != *" --max-num-batched-tokens "* \
38	            && " ${EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS:-} " != *" --max-num-batched-tokens="* ]]; then
39	            export EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS="--max-num-batched-tokens $max_num_batched_tokens${EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS:+ $EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS}"
40	            native_batched_tokens_log="$max_num_batched_tokens"
41	        else
42	            native_batched_tokens_log="EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS override"
43	        fi
44	        ;;
45	    *)
46	        echo "NEURON_SCHEDULER must be custom or native" >&2
47	        exit 2
48	        ;;

53	    printf -v OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG \
54	        '{"enable_bucketing":true,"seq_len":%s,"max_context_length":%s,"context_encoding_buckets":[16384],"prefix_buckets":[114688],"token_generation_buckets":[16384,32768,65536,98304,128000],"save_sharded_checkpoint":true,"blockwise_matmul_config":{"use_shard_on_intermediate_dynamic_while":true}}' \
55	        "$MAX_MODEL_LEN" "$MAX_MODEL_LEN"
56	    export OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG
57	fi
58

65	config.setdefault("chunked_prefill_config", {"max_num_seqs": int(sys.argv[2])})

67	' "$OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG" "$MAX_NUM_SEQS")"
68	    export OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG
69	fi
70	
71	"$PYTHON_BIN" -c 'import json,sys; c=json.loads(sys.argv[1]); m=int(sys.argv[2]); s=c.get("context_encoding_buckets"); p=c.get("prefix_buckets"); g=c.get("token_generation_buckets"); pair=max(s)+max(p) if s and p else None; (pair is None or (pair <= 131072 and pair >= m)) or sys.exit(f"APC buckets cover {pair} tokens; require MAX_MODEL_LEN={m} without exceeding NKI limit 131072"); (g is None or (g and max(g) >= m)) or sys.exit(f"Token-generation buckets do not cover MAX_MODEL_LEN={m}")' "$OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG" "$MAX_MODEL_LEN"
72	
73	printf 'Neuron scheduler: %s (chunked_prefill=%s)\n' \
74	    "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" "$ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL"
75	if [[ "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" == "native" ]]; then
76	    printf 'Native max-num-batched-tokens: %s\n' \
77	        "$native_batched_tokens_log"
78	fi

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

export MODEL="${MODEL:-Alibaba-NLP/Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B}"
export SERVED_MODEL_NAME="${SERVED_MODEL_NAME:-$MODEL}"
export PORT="${PORT:-6008}"
export TP_SIZE="${TP_SIZE:-8}"
export MAX_MODEL_LEN="${MAX_MODEL_LEN:-128000}"
export MAX_NUM_SEQS="${MAX_NUM_SEQS:-2}"
export BLOCK_SIZE="${BLOCK_SIZE:-32}"
export NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE="${NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE:-$(( (MAX_MODEL_LEN + BLOCK_SIZE - 1) / BLOCK_SIZE * MAX_NUM_SEQS ))}"
export ENABLE_PREFIX_CACHING="${ENABLE_PREFIX_CACHING:-1}"
export NEURON_SCHEDULER="${NEURON_SCHEDULER:-custom}"
export NEURON_LOGICAL_NC_CONFIG="${NEURON_LOGICAL_NC_CONFIG:-2}"
export PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "$0")/../.." && pwd)/.venv-neuron/bin/python}"

case "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" in
    custom)
        export DISABLE_NEURON_CUSTOM_SCHEDULER=0
        export ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL="${ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL:-0}"
        echo "WARNING: custom Neuron scheduling does not chunk prefill; a cold uncached suffix larger than the compiled context bucket can terminate EngineCore." >&2
        ;;
    native)
        # Native vLLM scheduling is the only Neuron path that retains chunked
        # prefill. Validate it with a separate compiled artifact/cache first.
        export DISABLE_NEURON_CUSTOM_SCHEDULER=1
        export ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL="${ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL:-1}"
        max_num_batched_tokens="${MAX_NUM_BATCHED_TOKENS:-16384}"
        if [[ ! "$max_num_batched_tokens" =~ ^[1-9][0-9]*$ ]] \
            || (( max_num_batched_tokens > MAX_MODEL_LEN )); then
            echo "MAX_NUM_BATCHED_TOKENS must be in 1..MAX_MODEL_LEN for native scheduling." >&2
            exit 2
        fi
        # vLLM's native default is too small for the compiled 16k uncached
        # context bucket. Respect an explicit CLI override when testing a
        # different chunk size.
        if [[ " ${EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS:-} " != *" --max-num-batched-tokens "* \
            && " ${EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS:-} " != *" --max-num-batched-tokens="* ]]; then
            export EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS="--max-num-batched-tokens $max_num_batched_tokens${EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS:+ $EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS}"
            native_batched_tokens_log="$max_num_batched_tokens"
        else
            native_batched_tokens_log="EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS override"
        fi
        ;;
    *)
        echo "NEURON_SCHEDULER must be custom or native" >&2
        exit 2
        ;;
esac

export NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="${NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES:-0-7}"
if [[ -z "${OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG:-}" ]]; then
    printf -v OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG \
        '{"enable_bucketing":true,"seq_len":%s,"max_context_length":%s,"context_encoding_buckets":[16384],"prefix_buckets":[114688],"token_generation_buckets":[16384,32768,65536,98304,128000],"save_sharded_checkpoint":true,"blockwise_matmul_config":{"use_shard_on_intermediate_dynamic_while":true}}' \
        "$MAX_MODEL_LEN" "$MAX_MODEL_LEN"
    export OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG
fi

if [[ "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" == "native" ]]; then
    OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG="$($PYTHON_BIN -c '
import json
import sys

config = json.loads(sys.argv[1])
config.setdefault("chunked_prefill_config", {"max_num_seqs": int(sys.argv[2])})
print(json.dumps(config, separators=(",", ":")))
' "$OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG" "$MAX_NUM_SEQS")"
    export OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG
fi

"$PYTHON_BIN" -c 'import json,sys; c=json.loads(sys.argv[1]); m=int(sys.argv[2]); s=c.get("context_encoding_buckets"); p=c.get("prefix_buckets"); g=c.get("token_generation_buckets"); pair=max(s)+max(p) if s and p else None; (pair is None or (pair <= 131072 and pair >= m)) or sys.exit(f"APC buckets cover {pair} tokens; require MAX_MODEL_LEN={m} without exceeding NKI limit 131072"); (g is None or (g and max(g) >= m)) or sys.exit(f"Token-generation buckets do not cover MAX_MODEL_LEN={m}")' "$OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG" "$MAX_MODEL_LEN"

printf 'Neuron scheduler: %s (chunked_prefill=%s)\n' \
    "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" "$ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL"
if [[ "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" == "native" ]]; then
    printf 'Native max-num-batched-tokens: %s\n' \
        "$native_batched_tokens_log"
fi
exec "$(dirname "$0")/serve_vllm_neuron.bash"

content.content:
1	#!/usr/bin/env bash
2	set -euo pipefail
3	
4	SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
5	REPO_ROOT="$(cd -- "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"
6	MODEL="${MODEL:-Alibaba-NLP/Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B}"
7	FIRST_PORT="${FIRST_PORT:-6008}"
8	TONGYI_REPLICAS="${TONGYI_REPLICAS:-7}"
9	TP_SIZE="${TP_SIZE:-8}"
10	TOTAL_NEURON_CORES=64
11	EMBEDDING_TP_SIZE=8
12	EMBEDDING_CORE_START=$((TOTAL_NEURON_CORES - EMBEDDING_TP_SIZE))
13	EMBEDDING_CORE_END=$((TOTAL_NEURON_CORES - 1))
14	EMBEDDING_PORT="${EMBEDDING_PORT:-6030}"
15	START_EMBEDDING_SERVER="${START_EMBEDDING_SERVER:-1}"
16	MAX_PARALLEL_STARTS="${MAX_PARALLEL_STARTS:-2}"
17	LOG_DIR="${LOG_DIR:-$REPO_ROOT/logs/neuron-servers/$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)}"
18	PLANNING_RESTART_DIR="${PLANNING_RESTART_DIR:-}"
19	PIDS=()
20	
21	if [[ ! "$TONGYI_REPLICAS" =~ ^[1-9][0-9]*$ ]]; then
22	    echo "TONGYI_REPLICAS must be a positive integer." >&2
23	    exit 2
24	fi
25	if [[ ! "$TP_SIZE" =~ ^[1-9][0-9]*$ ]]; then
26	    echo "TP_SIZE must be a positive integer." >&2
27	    exit 2
28	fi
29	if (( TONGYI_REPLICAS * TP_SIZE > EMBEDDING_CORE_START )); then
30	    echo "Tongyi needs ${TONGYI_REPLICAS}*TP=${TP_SIZE} cores, but cores ${EMBEDDING_CORE_START}-${EMBEDDING_CORE_END} are reserved for Qwen3 embedding TP=8." >&2
31	    exit 2
32	fi
33	if [[ "$MAX_PARALLEL_STARTS" -lt 1 || "$MAX_PARALLEL_STARTS" -gt 2 ]]; then
34	    echo "MAX_PARALLEL_STARTS must be 1 or 2." >&2
35	    exit 2
36	fi
37	if ! command -v numactl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
38	    echo "numactl is required for Trn2 NUMA placement." >&2
39	    exit 1
40	fi
41	
42	cleanup() {
43	    local pid
44	    trap - EXIT INT TERM
45	    for pid in "${PIDS[@]}"; do
46	        kill "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
47	    done
48	    for pid in "${PIDS[@]}"; do
49	        wait "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
50	    done
51	}
52	trap cleanup EXIT
53	trap 'exit 130' INT TERM
54	
55	numa_node_for_core() {
56	    local core_start="$1"
57	    if (( core_start <= 15 || core_start >= 48 )); then
58	        echo 1
59	    else
60	        echo 0
61	    fi
62	}
63	
64	wait_ready() {
65	    local pid="$1"
66	    local url="$2"
67	    local label="$3"
68	    until curl -fsS "$url" >/dev/null 2>&1; do
69	        if [[ -n "$pid" ]] && ! kill -0 "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
70	            set +e
71	            wait "$pid"
72	            local status=$?
73	            set -e
74	            echo "$label exited before becoming ready (status=$status)." >&2
75	            exit "${status:-1}"
76	        fi
77	        sleep 10
78	    done
79	    echo "$label is ready."
80	}
81	
82	wait_tongyi_ready() {
83	    local pid="$1"
84	    local port="$2"
85	    local label="$3"
86	    until curl -fsS "http://127.0.0.1:${port}/v1/models" >/dev/null 2>&1; do
87	        if ! kill -0 "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
88	            set +e
89	            wait "$pid"
90	            local status=$?
91	            set -e
92	            echo "$label exited before becoming ready (status=$status)." >&2
93	            return "${status:-1}"
94	        fi
95	        sleep 2
96	    done
97	    echo "$label is ready."
98	}
99	
100	stop_tongyi() {
101	    local pid="$1"
102	    local _
103	    kill "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
104	    for _ in {1..10}; do
105	        kill -0 "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || return 0
106	        sleep 1
107	    done
108	    kill -9 "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
109	}
110	
111	write_generation() {
112	    local port="$1"
113	    local generation="$2"
114	    local path temporary
115	    [[ -n "$PLANNING_RESTART_DIR" ]] || return 0
116	    path="$PLANNING_RESTART_DIR/tongyi-${port}.generation"
117	    temporary="$path.tmp.$$"
118	    printf '%s\n' "$generation" > "$temporary"
119	    mv -- "$temporary" "$path"
120	}
121	
122	run_tongyi_supervisor() {
123	    local replica="$1"
124	    local port=$((FIRST_PORT + replica))
125	    local core_start=$((replica * TP_SIZE))
126	    local core_end=$((core_start + TP_SIZE - 1))
127	    local numa_node server_pid generation=0 request_path
128	    numa_node="$(numa_node_for_core "$core_start")"
129	
130	    if [[ -n "$PLANNING_RESTART_DIR" ]]; then
131	        rm -f -- "$PLANNING_RESTART_DIR/tongyi-${port}.restart" \
132	            "$PLANNING_RESTART_DIR"/tongyi-"${port}".restart.* \
133	            "$PLANNING_RESTART_DIR/tongyi-${port}.generation"
134	    fi
135	    trap '[[ -n "${server_pid:-}" ]] && stop_tongyi "$server_pid"; exit 0' INT TERM
136	
137	    while true; do
138	        request_path="${PLANNING_RESTART_DIR:+$PLANNING_RESTART_DIR/tongyi-${port}.restart.${generation}}"
139	        echo "Starting Tongyi replica $replica: port=$port cores=$core_start-$core_end numa=$numa_node"
140	        numactl --cpunodebind="$numa_node" --membind="$numa_node" \
141	            env \
142	            MODEL="$MODEL" \
143	            TP_SIZE="$TP_SIZE" \
144	            PORT="$port" \
145	            NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="$core_start-$core_end" \
146	            NEURON_REQUIRE_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS=1 \
147	            bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi.bash" \
148	            >>"$LOG_DIR/tongyi-$port.log" 2>&1 &
149	        server_pid=$!
150	
151	        if wait_tongyi_ready "$server_pid" "$port" "Tongyi port $port"; then
152	            generation=$((generation + 1))
153	            write_generation "$port" "$generation"
154	            [[ -z "$request_path" ]] || rm -f -- "$request_path"
155	            request_path="${PLANNING_RESTART_DIR:+$PLANNING_RESTART_DIR/tongyi-${port}.restart.${generation}}"
156	        else
157	            sleep 1
158	            continue
159	        fi
160	
161	        while kill -0 "$server_pid" >/dev/null 2>&1; do
162	            if [[ -n "$request_path" && -e "$request_path" ]]; then
163	                rm -f -- "$request_path"
164	                echo "Restart requested for Tongyi port $port."
165	                stop_tongyi "$server_pid"
166	                break
167	            fi
168	            sleep 1
169	        done
170	
171	        set +e
172	        wait "$server_pid"
173	        status=$?
174	        set -e
175	        echo "Tongyi port $port exited (status=$status); restarting."
176	        sleep 1
177	    done
178	}
179	
180	launch_tongyi() {
181	    run_tongyi_supervisor "$1" &
182	    LAST_PID=$!
183	    PIDS+=("$LAST_PID")
184	}
185	
186	launch_embedding() {
187	    echo "Starting Qwen3 embedding: port=$EMBEDDING_PORT cores=$EMBEDDING_CORE_START-$EMBEDDING_CORE_END numa=1"
188	    numactl --cpunodebind=1 --membind=1 \
189	        env \
190	        PORT="$EMBEDDING_PORT" \
191	        NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="$EMBEDDING_CORE_START-$EMBEDDING_CORE_END" \
192	        bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_qwen3_embedding.bash" \
193	        >"$LOG_DIR/embedding-$EMBEDDING_PORT.log" 2>&1 &
194	    LAST_PID=$!
195	    PIDS+=("$LAST_PID")
196	}
197	
198	mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"
199	if [[ -n "$PLANNING_RESTART_DIR" ]]; then
200	    mkdir -p "$PLANNING_RESTART_DIR"
201	fi
202	echo "Neuron server logs: $LOG_DIR"
203	
204	if (( TP_SIZE == 16 && TONGYI_REPLICAS == 3 && MAX_PARALLEL_STARTS == 2 )); then
205	    echo "Starting all TP16 Tongyi replicas and embedding service in parallel."
206	
207	    launch_tongyi 0
208	    replica0_pid="$LAST_PID"
209	    launch_tongyi 1
210	    replica1_pid="$LAST_PID"
211	    launch_tongyi 2
212	    replica2_pid="$LAST_PID"
213	    if [[ "$START_EMBEDDING_SERVER" == "1" ]]; then
214	        launch_embedding
215	        embedding_pid="$LAST_PID"
216	    fi
217	
218	    wait_ready "$replica0_pid" "http://127.0.0.1:$FIRST_PORT/v1/models" "Tongyi port $FIRST_PORT"
219	    wait_ready "$replica1_pid" "http://127.0.0.1:$((FIRST_PORT + 1))/v1/models" "Tongyi port $((FIRST_PORT + 1))"
220	    wait_ready "$replica2_pid" "http://127.0.0.1:$((FIRST_PORT + 2))/v1/models" "Tongyi port $((FIRST_PORT + 2))"
221	    if [[ "$START_EMBEDDING_SERVER" == "1" ]]; then
222	        wait_ready "$embedding_pid" "http://127.0.0.1:$EMBEDDING_PORT/health" "Embedding service"
223	    fi
224	else
225	    replica=1
226	    while (( replica < TONGYI_REPLICAS )); do
227	        batch_pids=()
228	        batch_ports=()
229	        for ((slot = 0; slot < MAX_PARALLEL_STARTS && replica < TONGYI_REPLICAS; slot++)); do
230	            launch_tongyi "$replica"
231	            batch_pids+=("$LAST_PID")
232	            batch_ports+=("$((FIRST_PORT + replica))")
233	            ((replica += 1))
234	        done
235	        for index in "${!batch_pids[@]}"; do
236	            wait_ready "${batch_pids[$index]}" "http://127.0.0.1:${batch_ports[$index]}/v1/models" "Tongyi port ${batch_ports[$index]}"
237	        done
238	    done
239	
240	    if [[ "$START_EMBEDDING_SERVER" == "1" ]]; then
241	        launch_embedding
242	        wait_ready "$LAST_PID" "http://127.0.0.1:$EMBEDDING_PORT/health" "Embedding service"
243	    fi
244	
245	    launch_tongyi 0
246	    wait_ready "$LAST_PID" "http://127.0.0.1:$FIRST_PORT/v1/models" "Tongyi port $FIRST_PORT"
247	fi
248	
249	echo "All $TONGYI_REPLICAS Tongyi replicas (TP=$TP_SIZE) and embedding service (TP=8) are ready."
250	wait

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
REPO_ROOT="$(cd -- "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"
MODEL="${MODEL:-Alibaba-NLP/Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B}"
FIRST_PORT="${FIRST_PORT:-6008}"
TONGYI_REPLICAS="${TONGYI_REPLICAS:-7}"
TP_SIZE="${TP_SIZE:-8}"
TOTAL_NEURON_CORES=64
EMBEDDING_TP_SIZE=8
EMBEDDING_CORE_START=$((TOTAL_NEURON_CORES - EMBEDDING_TP_SIZE))
EMBEDDING_CORE_END=$((TOTAL_NEURON_CORES - 1))
EMBEDDING_PORT="${EMBEDDING_PORT:-6030}"
START_EMBEDDING_SERVER="${START_EMBEDDING_SERVER:-1}"
MAX_PARALLEL_STARTS="${MAX_PARALLEL_STARTS:-2}"
LOG_DIR="${LOG_DIR:-$REPO_ROOT/logs/neuron-servers/$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)}"
PLANNING_RESTART_DIR="${PLANNING_RESTART_DIR:-}"
PIDS=()

if [[ ! "$TONGYI_REPLICAS" =~ ^[1-9][0-9]*$ ]]; then
    echo "TONGYI_REPLICAS must be a positive integer." >&2
    exit 2
fi
if [[ ! "$TP_SIZE" =~ ^[1-9][0-9]*$ ]]; then
    echo "TP_SIZE must be a positive integer." >&2
    exit 2
fi
if (( TONGYI_REPLICAS * TP_SIZE > EMBEDDING_CORE_START )); then
    echo "Tongyi needs ${TONGYI_REPLICAS}*TP=${TP_SIZE} cores, but cores ${EMBEDDING_CORE_START}-${EMBEDDING_CORE_END} are reserved for Qwen3 embedding TP=8." >&2
    exit 2
fi
if [[ "$MAX_PARALLEL_STARTS" -lt 1 || "$MAX_PARALLEL_STARTS" -gt 2 ]]; then
    echo "MAX_PARALLEL_STARTS must be 1 or 2." >&2
    exit 2
fi
if ! command -v numactl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "numactl is required for Trn2 NUMA placement." >&2
    exit 1
fi

cleanup() {
    local pid
    trap - EXIT INT TERM
    for pid in "${PIDS[@]}"; do
        kill "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
    done
    for pid in "${PIDS[@]}"; do
        wait "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
    done
}
trap cleanup EXIT
trap 'exit 130' INT TERM

numa_node_for_core() {
    local core_start="$1"
    if (( core_start <= 15 || core_start >= 48 )); then
        echo 1
    else
        echo 0
    fi
}

wait_ready() {
    local pid="$1"
    local url="$2"
    local label="$3"
    until curl -fsS "$url" >/dev/null 2>&1; do
        if [[ -n "$pid" ]] && ! kill -0 "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            set +e
            wait "$pid"
            local status=$?
            set -e
            echo "$label exited before becoming ready (status=$status)." >&2
            exit "${status:-1}"
        fi
        sleep 10
    done
    echo "$label is ready."
}

wait_tongyi_ready() {
    local pid="$1"
    local port="$2"
    local label="$3"
    until curl -fsS "http://127.0.0.1:${port}/v1/models" >/dev/null 2>&1; do
        if ! kill -0 "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            set +e
            wait "$pid"
            local status=$?
            set -e
            echo "$label exited before becoming ready (status=$status)." >&2
            return "${status:-1}"
        fi
        sleep 2
    done
    echo "$label is ready."
}

stop_tongyi() {
    local pid="$1"
    local _
    kill "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
    for _ in {1..10}; do
        kill -0 "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || return 0
        sleep 1
    done
    kill -9 "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
}

write_generation() {
    local port="$1"
    local generation="$2"
    local path temporary
    [[ -n "$PLANNING_RESTART_DIR" ]] || return 0
    path="$PLANNING_RESTART_DIR/tongyi-${port}.generation"
    temporary="$path.tmp.$$"
    printf '%s\n' "$generation" > "$temporary"
    mv -- "$temporary" "$path"
}

run_tongyi_supervisor() {
    local replica="$1"
    local port=$((FIRST_PORT + replica))
    local core_start=$((replica * TP_SIZE))
    local core_end=$((core_start + TP_SIZE - 1))
    local numa_node server_pid generation=0 request_path
    numa_node="$(numa_node_for_core "$core_start")"

    if [[ -n "$PLANNING_RESTART_DIR" ]]; then
        rm -f -- "$PLANNING_RESTART_DIR/tongyi-${port}.restart" \
            "$PLANNING_RESTART_DIR"/tongyi-"${port}".restart.* \
            "$PLANNING_RESTART_DIR/tongyi-${port}.generation"
    fi
    trap '[[ -n "${server_pid:-}" ]] && stop_tongyi "$server_pid"; exit 0' INT TERM

    while true; do
        request_path="${PLANNING_RESTART_DIR:+$PLANNING_RESTART_DIR/tongyi-${port}.restart.${generation}}"
        echo "Starting Tongyi replica $replica: port=$port cores=$core_start-$core_end numa=$numa_node"
        numactl --cpunodebind="$numa_node" --membind="$numa_node" \
            env \
            MODEL="$MODEL" \
            TP_SIZE="$TP_SIZE" \
            PORT="$port" \
            NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="$core_start-$core_end" \
            NEURON_REQUIRE_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS=1 \
            bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi.bash" \
            >>"$LOG_DIR/tongyi-$port.log" 2>&1 &
        server_pid=$!

        if wait_tongyi_ready "$server_pid" "$port" "Tongyi port $port"; then
            generation=$((generation + 1))
            write_generation "$port" "$generation"
            [[ -z "$request_path" ]] || rm -f -- "$request_path"
            request_path="${PLANNING_RESTART_DIR:+$PLANNING_RESTART_DIR/tongyi-${port}.restart.${generation}}"
        else
            sleep 1
            continue
        fi

        while kill -0 "$server_pid" >/dev/null 2>&1; do
            if [[ -n "$request_path" && -e "$request_path" ]]; then
                rm -f -- "$request_path"
                echo "Restart requested for Tongyi port $port."
                stop_tongyi "$server_pid"
                break
            fi
            sleep 1
        done

        set +e
        wait "$server_pid"
        status=$?
        set -e
        echo "Tongyi port $port exited (status=$status); restarting."
        sleep 1
    done
}

launch_tongyi() {
    run_tongyi_supervisor "$1" &
    LAST_PID=$!
    PIDS+=("$LAST_PID")
}

launch_embedding() {
    echo "Starting Qwen3 embedding: port=$EMBEDDING_PORT cores=$EMBEDDING_CORE_START-$EMBEDDING_CORE_END numa=1"
    numactl --cpunodebind=1 --membind=1 \
        env \
        PORT="$EMBEDDING_PORT" \
        NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="$EMBEDDING_CORE_START-$EMBEDDING_CORE_END" \
        bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_qwen3_embedding.bash" \
        >"$LOG_DIR/embedding-$EMBEDDING_PORT.log" 2>&1 &
    LAST_PID=$!
    PIDS+=("$LAST_PID")
}

mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"
if [[ -n "$PLANNING_RESTART_DIR" ]]; then
    mkdir -p "$PLANNING_RESTART_DIR"
fi
echo "Neuron server logs: $LOG_DIR"

if (( TP_SIZE == 16 && TONGYI_REPLICAS == 3 && MAX_PARALLEL_STARTS == 2 )); then
    echo "Starting all TP16 Tongyi replicas and embedding service in parallel."

    launch_tongyi 0
    replica0_pid="$LAST_PID"
    launch_tongyi 1
    replica1_pid="$LAST_PID"
    launch_tongyi 2
    replica2_pid="$LAST_PID"
    if [[ "$START_EMBEDDING_SERVER" == "1" ]]; then
        launch_embedding
        embedding_pid="$LAST_PID"
    fi

    wait_ready "$replica0_pid" "http://127.0.0.1:$FIRST_PORT/v1/models" "Tongyi port $FIRST_PORT"
    wait_ready "$replica1_pid" "http://127.0.0.1:$((FIRST_PORT + 1))/v1/models" "Tongyi port $((FIRST_PORT + 1))"
    wait_ready "$replica2_pid" "http://127.0.0.1:$((FIRST_PORT + 2))/v1/models" "Tongyi port $((FIRST_PORT + 2))"
    if [[ "$START_EMBEDDING_SERVER" == "1" ]]; then
        wait_ready "$embedding_pid" "http://127.0.0.1:$EMBEDDING_PORT/health" "Embedding service"
    fi
else
    replica=1
    while (( replica < TONGYI_REPLICAS )); do
        batch_pids=()
        batch_ports=()
        for ((slot = 0; slot < MAX_PARALLEL_STARTS && replica < TONGYI_REPLICAS; slot++)); do
            launch_tongyi "$replica"
            batch_pids+=("$LAST_PID")
            batch_ports+=("$((FIRST_PORT + replica))")
            ((replica += 1))
        done
        for index in "${!batch_pids[@]}"; do
            wait_ready "${batch_pids[$index]}" "http://127.0.0.1:${batch_ports[$index]}/v1/models" "Tongyi port ${batch_ports[$index]}"
        done
    done

    if [[ "$START_EMBEDDING_SERVER" == "1" ]]; then
        launch_embedding
        wait_ready "$LAST_PID" "http://127.0.0.1:$EMBEDDING_PORT/health" "Embedding service"
    fi

    launch_tongyi 0
    wait_ready "$LAST_PID" "http://127.0.0.1:$FIRST_PORT/v1/models" "Tongyi port $FIRST_PORT"
fi

echo "All $TONGYI_REPLICAS Tongyi replicas (TP=$TP_SIZE) and embedding service (TP=8) are ready."
wait

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"

export PORT="${PORT:-6016}"
export TP_SIZE="${TP_SIZE:-16}"
export MAX_MODEL_LEN="${MAX_MODEL_LEN:-128000}"
export MAX_NUM_SEQS="${MAX_NUM_SEQS:-2}"
export NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="${NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES:-8-23}"

if [[ -z "${OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG:-}" ]]; then
    printf -v OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG \
        '{"enable_bucketing":true,"seq_len":%s,"max_context_length":%s,"context_encoding_buckets":[16384],"prefix_buckets":[114688],"token_generation_buckets":[16384,32768,65536,98304,128000],"save_sharded_checkpoint":true,"blockwise_matmul_config":{"use_shard_on_intermediate_dynamic_while":true}}' \
        "$MAX_MODEL_LEN" "$MAX_MODEL_LEN"
    export OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG
fi

exec bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi.bash"

1	#!/usr/bin/env bash
2	set -euo pipefail
3	
4	MODEL="${MODEL:?Set MODEL to the Hugging Face model id or local checkpoint path}"
5	REQUESTED_MODEL="$MODEL"
6	SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
7	REPO_ROOT="$(cd -- "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"
8	PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-$REPO_ROOT/.venv-neuron/bin/python}"
9	PORT="${PORT:-8000}"
10	TP_SIZE="${TP_SIZE:-4}"
11	MAX_MODEL_LEN="${MAX_MODEL_LEN:-4096}"
12	MAX_NUM_SEQS="${MAX_NUM_SEQS:-1}"
13	BLOCK_SIZE="${BLOCK_SIZE:-128}"
14	NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE="${NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE:-}"
15	ENABLE_PREFIX_CACHING="${ENABLE_PREFIX_CACHING:-}"
16	ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL="${ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL:-}"
17	HOST="${HOST:-0.0.0.0}"
18	NEURON_FRAMEWORK="${VLLM_NEURON_FRAMEWORK:-neuronx-distributed-inference}"
19	NEURON_CACHE_TAG="${NEURON_CACHE_TAG:-default}"
20	NEURON_SCHEDULER="${NEURON_SCHEDULER:-custom}"
21	
22	if [[ "$PYTHON_BIN" != /* && -e "$PYTHON_BIN" ]]; then
23	    PYTHON_BIN="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "$PYTHON_BIN")" && pwd)/$(basename -- "$PYTHON_BIN")"
24	fi
25	
26	SERVED_MODEL_NAME="${SERVED_MODEL_NAME:-$REQUESTED_MODEL}"
27	TOKENIZER="${TOKENIZER:-$REQUESTED_MODEL}"
28	LOCAL_MODEL_PATH="$REPO_ROOT/local-models/$REQUESTED_MODEL"
29	MODEL_SOURCE="hugging-face"
30	
31	has_complete_local_weights() {
32	    local index_file
33	
34	    [[ -f "$LOCAL_MODEL_PATH/config.json" ]] || return 1
35	    if [[ -f "$LOCAL_MODEL_PATH/model.safetensors" || -f "$LOCAL_MODEL_PATH/pytorch_model.bin" ]]; then
36	        return 0
37	    fi
38	
39	    for index_file in model.safetensors.index.json pytorch_model.bin.index.json; do
40	        if [[ -f "$LOCAL_MODEL_PATH/$index_file" ]]; then
41	            "$PYTHON_BIN" - "$LOCAL_MODEL_PATH" "$index_file" <<'PY'
42	import json
43	import sys
44	from pathlib import Path
45	
46	model_dir = Path(sys.argv[1])
47	index = json.loads((model_dir / sys.argv[2]).read_text())
48	shards = set(index.get("weight_map", {}).values())
49	raise SystemExit(not shards or any(not (model_dir / shard).is_file() for shard in shards))
50	PY
51	            return
52	        fi
53	    done
54	
55	    return 1
56	}
57	
58	if [[ -e "$REQUESTED_MODEL" ]]; then
59	    if [[ "$REQUESTED_MODEL" == /* ]]; then
60	        MODEL="$REQUESTED_MODEL"
61	    else
62	        MODEL="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "$REQUESTED_MODEL")" && pwd)/$(basename -- "$REQUESTED_MODEL")"
63	    fi
64	    MODEL_SOURCE="local-explicit"
65	elif has_complete_local_weights; then
66	    MODEL="$LOCAL_MODEL_PATH"
67	    MODEL_SOURCE="local-cache"
68	fi
69	
70	if [[ -z "${OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG:-}" ]]; then
71	    OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG=$(printf '{"enable_bucketing":true,"seq_len":%s,"max_context_length":%s}' \
72	        "$MAX_MODEL_LEN" "$MAX_MODEL_LEN")
73	fi
74	
75	export VLLM_NEURON_FRAMEWORK="$NEURON_FRAMEWORK"
76	export PATH="$(dirname -- "$PYTHON_BIN"):$PATH"
77	
78	if [[ -z "${NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS:-}" ]]; then
79	    stack_versions="$("$PYTHON_BIN" -c '
80	from importlib.metadata import PackageNotFoundError, version
81	
82	packages = (
83	    "vllm",
84	    "vllm-neuron",
85	    "torch-neuronx",
86	    "neuronx-distributed",
87	    "neuronx-distributed-inference",
88	    "neuronx-cc",
89	    "nki",
90	)
91	
92	def installed_version(name):
93	    try:
94	        return version(name)
95	    except PackageNotFoundError:
96	        return "missing"
97	
98	print("|".join(f"{name}={installed_version(name)}" for name in packages))
99	')"
100	    cache_fingerprint="$(printf '%s\n' \
101	        "model=$REQUESTED_MODEL" \
102	        "tp_size=$TP_SIZE" \
103	        "max_model_len=$MAX_MODEL_LEN" \
104	        "max_num_seqs=$MAX_NUM_SEQS" \
105	        "block_size=$BLOCK_SIZE" \
106	        "num_gpu_blocks_override=$NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE" \
107	        "enable_prefix_caching=$ENABLE_PREFIX_CACHING" \
108	        "enable_chunked_prefill=$ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL" \
109	        "neuron_scheduler=$NEURON_SCHEDULER" \
110	        "framework=$NEURON_FRAMEWORK" \
111	        "override_neuron_config=$OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG" \
112	        "extra_vllm_args=${EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS:-}" \
113	        "cache_tag=$NEURON_CACHE_TAG" \
114	        "stack=$stack_versions")"
115	    cache_hash="$(sha256sum <<< "$cache_fingerprint")"
116	    cache_hash="${cache_hash%% *}"
117	    NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/$cache_hash"
118	fi
119	export NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS
120	
121	artifact_state="cold"
122	if [[ -f "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS/model.pt" ]]; then
123	    artifact_state="ready"
124	elif [[ -n "$(find "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -print -quit 2>/dev/null)" ]]; then
125	    artifact_state="incomplete"
126	fi
127	
128	if [[ "$artifact_state" == "incomplete" && "${NEURON_QUARANTINE_INCOMPLETE_ARTIFACTS:-0}" == "1" ]]; then
129	    incomplete_artifact="$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS.failed-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)"
130	    mv -- "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" "$incomplete_artifact"
131	    printf 'Quarantined incomplete Neuron artifact: %s\n' "$incomplete_artifact"
132	    artifact_state="cold"
133	fi
134	
135	if [[ "${NEURON_REQUIRE_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS:-0}" == "1" && "$artifact_state" != "ready" ]]; then
136	    echo "NEURON_REQUIRE_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS=1 but no complete model.pt exists at:" >&2
137	    echo "  $NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" >&2
138	    echo "Run the matching compile script once before starting runtime replicas." >&2
139	    exit 1
140	fi
141	
142	args=(
143	    "$PYTHON_BIN" -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server
144	    --model "$MODEL"
145	    --tokenizer "$TOKENIZER"
146	    --host "$HOST"
147	    --port "$PORT"
148	    --tensor-parallel-size "$TP_SIZE"
149	    --max-model-len "$MAX_MODEL_LEN"
150	    --max-num-seqs "$MAX_NUM_SEQS"
151	    --block-size "$BLOCK_SIZE"
152	)
153	
154	if [[ -n "${NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS:-}" ]]; then
155	    args=(
156	        "$PYTHON_BIN" -m search_agent.neuron_vllm_launcher
157	        "${args[@]:3}"
158	    )
159	fi
160	
161	args+=(--served-model-name "$SERVED_MODEL_NAME")
162	
163	if [[ -n "$NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE" ]]; then
