#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

MODEL="${MODEL:?Set MODEL to the Hugging Face model id or local checkpoint path}"
REQUESTED_MODEL="$MODEL"
SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
REPO_ROOT="$(cd -- "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"
PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-$REPO_ROOT/.venv-neuron/bin/python}"
PORT="${PORT:-8000}"
TP_SIZE="${TP_SIZE:-4}"
MAX_MODEL_LEN="${MAX_MODEL_LEN:-4096}"
MAX_NUM_SEQS="${MAX_NUM_SEQS:-1}"
BLOCK_SIZE="${BLOCK_SIZE:-128}"
NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE="${NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE:-}"
ENABLE_PREFIX_CACHING="${ENABLE_PREFIX_CACHING:-}"
ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL="${ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL:-}"
HOST="${HOST:-0.0.0.0}"
NEURON_FRAMEWORK="${VLLM_NEURON_FRAMEWORK:-neuronx-distributed-inference}"
NEURON_CACHE_TAG="${NEURON_CACHE_TAG:-default}"
NEURON_SCHEDULER="${NEURON_SCHEDULER:-custom}"

if [[ "$PYTHON_BIN" != /* && -e "$PYTHON_BIN" ]]; then
    PYTHON_BIN="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "$PYTHON_BIN")" && pwd)/$(basename -- "$PYTHON_BIN")"
fi

SERVED_MODEL_NAME="${SERVED_MODEL_NAME:-$REQUESTED_MODEL}"
TOKENIZER="${TOKENIZER:-$REQUESTED_MODEL}"
LOCAL_MODEL_PATH="$REPO_ROOT/local-models/$REQUESTED_MODEL"
MODEL_SOURCE="hugging-face"

has_complete_local_weights() {
    local index_file

    [[ -f "$LOCAL_MODEL_PATH/config.json" ]] || return 1
    if [[ -f "$LOCAL_MODEL_PATH/model.safetensors" || -f "$LOCAL_MODEL_PATH/pytorch_model.bin" ]]; then
        return 0
    fi

    for index_file in model.safetensors.index.json pytorch_model.bin.index.json; do
        if [[ -f "$LOCAL_MODEL_PATH/$index_file" ]]; then
            "$PYTHON_BIN" - "$LOCAL_MODEL_PATH" "$index_file" <<'PY'
import json
import sys
from pathlib import Path

model_dir = Path(sys.argv[1])
index = json.loads((model_dir / sys.argv[2]).read_text())
shards = set(index.get("weight_map", {}).values())
raise SystemExit(not shards or any(not (model_dir / shard).is_file() for shard in shards))
PY
            return
        fi
    done

    return 1
}

if [[ -e "$REQUESTED_MODEL" ]]; then
    if [[ "$REQUESTED_MODEL" == /* ]]; then
        MODEL="$REQUESTED_MODEL"
    else
        MODEL="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "$REQUESTED_MODEL")" && pwd)/$(basename -- "$REQUESTED_MODEL")"
    fi
    MODEL_SOURCE="local-explicit"
elif has_complete_local_weights; then
    MODEL="$LOCAL_MODEL_PATH"
    MODEL_SOURCE="local-cache"
fi

if [[ -z "${OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG:-}" ]]; then
    OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG=$(printf '{"enable_bucketing":true,"seq_len":%s,"max_context_length":%s}' \
        "$MAX_MODEL_LEN" "$MAX_MODEL_LEN")
fi

export VLLM_NEURON_FRAMEWORK="$NEURON_FRAMEWORK"
export PATH="$(dirname -- "$PYTHON_BIN"):$PATH"

if [[ -z "${NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS:-}" ]]; then
    stack_versions="$("$PYTHON_BIN" -c '
from importlib.metadata import PackageNotFoundError, version

packages = (
    "vllm",
    "vllm-neuron",
    "torch-neuronx",
    "neuronx-distributed",
    "neuronx-distributed-inference",
    "neuronx-cc",
    "nki",
)

def installed_version(name):
    try:
        return version(name)
    except PackageNotFoundError:
        return "missing"

print("|".join(f"{name}={installed_version(name)}" for name in packages))
')"
    cache_fingerprint="$(printf '%s\n' \
        "model=$REQUESTED_MODEL" \
        "tp_size=$TP_SIZE" \
        "max_model_len=$MAX_MODEL_LEN" \
        "max_num_seqs=$MAX_NUM_SEQS" \
        "block_size=$BLOCK_SIZE" \
        "num_gpu_blocks_override=$NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE" \
        "enable_prefix_caching=$ENABLE_PREFIX_CACHING" \
        "enable_chunked_prefill=$ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL" \
        "neuron_scheduler=$NEURON_SCHEDULER" \
        "framework=$NEURON_FRAMEWORK" \
        "override_neuron_config=$OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG" \
        "extra_vllm_args=${EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS:-}" \
        "cache_tag=$NEURON_CACHE_TAG" \
        "stack=$stack_versions")"
    cache_hash="$(sha256sum <<< "$cache_fingerprint")"
    cache_hash="${cache_hash%% *}"
    NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/$cache_hash"
fi
export NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS

artifact_state="cold"
if [[ -f "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS/model.pt" ]]; then
    artifact_state="ready"
elif [[ -n "$(find "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -print -quit 2>/dev/null)" ]]; then
    artifact_state="incomplete"
fi

if [[ "$artifact_state" == "incomplete" && "${NEURON_QUARANTINE_INCOMPLETE_ARTIFACTS:-0}" == "1" ]]; then
    incomplete_artifact="$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS.failed-$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)"
    mv -- "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" "$incomplete_artifact"
    printf 'Quarantined incomplete Neuron artifact: %s\n' "$incomplete_artifact"
    artifact_state="cold"
fi

if [[ "${NEURON_REQUIRE_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS:-0}" == "1" && "$artifact_state" != "ready" ]]; then
    echo "NEURON_REQUIRE_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS=1 but no complete model.pt exists at:" >&2
    echo "  $NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" >&2
    echo "Run the matching compile script once before starting runtime replicas." >&2
    exit 1
fi

args=(
    "$PYTHON_BIN" -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server
    --model "$MODEL"
    --tokenizer "$TOKENIZER"
    --host "$HOST"
    --port "$PORT"
    --tensor-parallel-size "$TP_SIZE"
    --max-model-len "$MAX_MODEL_LEN"
    --max-num-seqs "$MAX_NUM_SEQS"
    --block-size "$BLOCK_SIZE"
)

if [[ -n "${NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS:-}" ]]; then
    args=(
        "$PYTHON_BIN" -m search_agent.neuron_vllm_launcher
        "${args[@]:3}"
    )
fi

args+=(--served-model-name "$SERVED_MODEL_NAME")

if [[ -n "$NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE" ]]; then
    args+=(--num-gpu-blocks-override "$NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE")
fi

case "$ENABLE_PREFIX_CACHING" in
    1 | true) args+=(--enable-prefix-caching) ;;
    0 | false) args+=(--no-enable-prefix-caching) ;;
    "") ;;
    *) echo "ENABLE_PREFIX_CACHING must be 0, 1, true, or false" >&2; exit 2 ;;
esac

case "$ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL" in
    1 | true) args+=(--enable-chunked-prefill) ;;
    0 | false) args+=(--no-enable-chunked-prefill) ;;
    "") ;;
    *) echo "ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL must be 0, 1, true, or false" >&2; exit 2 ;;
esac

if [[ -n "$OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG" ]]; then
    args+=(--additional-config "{\"override_neuron_config\":$OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG}")
fi

if [[ -n "${EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS:-}" ]]; then
    read -r -a extra_args <<< "$EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS"
    args+=("${extra_args[@]}")
fi

printf 'Starting Neuron vLLM server for %s on port %s (TP=%s, max_len=%s, max_seqs=%s, block_size=%s)\n' \
    "$SERVED_MODEL_NAME" "$PORT" "$TP_SIZE" "$MAX_MODEL_LEN" "$MAX_NUM_SEQS" "$BLOCK_SIZE"
printf 'Model weights: %s (%s)\n' "$MODEL" "$MODEL_SOURCE"
printf 'Tokenizer: %s\n' "$TOKENIZER"
printf 'Neuron compiled artifacts: %s (%s, tag=%s)\n' \
    "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" "$artifact_state" "$NEURON_CACHE_TAG"
printf 'Visible NeuronCores: %s\n' "${NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES:-all}"
cd -- "$REPO_ROOT"
exec "${args[@]}"

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
REPO_ROOT="$(cd -- "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"
PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-$REPO_ROOT/.venv-neuron-embedding/bin/python}"
TOKENIZER_PATH="${TOKENIZER_PATH:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/Qwen/Qwen3-Embedding-8B}"
COMPILED_MODEL_PATH="${COMPILED_MODEL_PATH:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/qwen3-embedding-8b-tp8-b2-s1024}"
HOST="${HOST:-127.0.0.1}"
PORT="${PORT:-6030}"
NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="${NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES:-56-63}"
MICROBATCH_WAIT_MS="${MICROBATCH_WAIT_MS:-5}"
NEURON_RT_MULTI_INSTANCE_SHARED_WEIGHTS="${NEURON_RT_MULTI_INSTANCE_SHARED_WEIGHTS:-TRUE}"

if [[ ! -x "$PYTHON_BIN" ]]; then
    echo "Missing embedding Python: $PYTHON_BIN" >&2
    exit 1
fi
if [[ ! -f "$COMPILED_MODEL_PATH/.compile-complete" ]]; then
    echo "Missing complete embedding artifact: $COMPILED_MODEL_PATH" >&2
    echo "Run compile_qwen3_embedding.bash first." >&2
    exit 1
fi
if [[ ! -f "$TOKENIZER_PATH/tokenizer_config.json" ]]; then
    echo "Missing embedding tokenizer: $TOKENIZER_PATH" >&2
    exit 1
fi

export NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES
export NEURON_RT_MULTI_INSTANCE_SHARED_WEIGHTS
export PATH="$(dirname -- "$PYTHON_BIN"):$PATH"
cd -- "$REPO_ROOT"
echo "Starting Qwen3 embedding service on $HOST:$PORT (cores=$NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES)"
exec "$PYTHON_BIN" -m search_agent.neuron_embedding_server \
    --compiled-model-path "$COMPILED_MODEL_PATH" \
    --tokenizer-path "$TOKENIZER_PATH" \
    --host "$HOST" \
    --port "$PORT" \
    --sequence-length 1024 \
    --embedding-dimension 4096 \
    --microbatch-wait-ms "$MICROBATCH_WAIT_MS"

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
REPO_ROOT="$(cd -- "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"

export PORT="${PORT:-6008}"
export TP_SIZE="${TP_SIZE:-8}"
export MAX_MODEL_LEN="${MAX_MODEL_LEN:-128000}"
export MAX_NUM_SEQS="${MAX_NUM_SEQS:-1}"
export NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="${NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES:-0-7}"
export NEURON_CACHE_TAG="${NEURON_CACHE_TAG:-tongyi-128k-prefix112-tp8-s1}"
# This artifact was compiled and loaded successfully on the current Neuron
# stack. Override it when deliberately serving a freshly recompiled artifact.
DEFAULT_TONGYI_TP8_S1_ARTIFACT="$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/9a36595723d1059555571d3bf524fa88a507814a2efbe2917865b6350bb75912"
export NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="${NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS:-$DEFAULT_TONGYI_TP8_S1_ARTIFACT}"

if [[ -z "${OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG:-}" ]]; then
    printf -v OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG \
        '{"enable_bucketing":true,"seq_len":%s,"max_context_length":%s,"context_encoding_buckets":[16384],"prefix_buckets":[114688],"token_generation_buckets":[16384,32768,65536,98304,128000],"save_sharded_checkpoint":true,"blockwise_matmul_config":{"use_shard_on_intermediate_dynamic_while":true}}' \
        "$MAX_MODEL_LEN" "$MAX_MODEL_LEN"
    export OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG
fi

exec bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi.bash"

1	#!/usr/bin/env bash
2	set -euo pipefail
3	
4	MODEL="${MODEL:-Alibaba-NLP/Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B}"
5	PORT="${PORT:-6008}"
6	TONGYI_REPLICAS="${TONGYI_REPLICAS:-7}"
7	TP_SIZE="${TP_SIZE:-8}"
8	PLANNING_PORTS="${PLANNING_PORTS:-$PORT-$((PORT + TONGYI_REPLICAS - 1))}"
9	PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITY="${PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITY:-2}"
10	EMBEDDING_PORT="${EMBEDDING_PORT:-6030}"
11	SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
12	REPO_ROOT="$(cd -- "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"
13	PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-$REPO_ROOT/.venv/bin/python}"
14	QUERY_FILE="${QUERY_FILE:-topics-qrels/queries.tsv}"
15	RUN_ROOT="${RUN_ROOT:-runs/qwen3-8b}"
16	CACHE_ROOT="${CACHE_ROOT:-cache/qwen3-8b}"
17	RUN_NAME="${RUN_NAME:-tongyi_neuron}"
18	NUM_THREADS="${NUM_THREADS:-30}"
19	START_SERVER="${START_SERVER:-1}"
20	MAX_QUERIES="${MAX_QUERIES:-}"
21	SERVER_PID=""
22	
23	cleanup() {
24	    if [[ -n "$SERVER_PID" ]] && kill -0 "$SERVER_PID" >/dev/null 2>&1; then

file.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

MODEL="${MODEL:-Alibaba-NLP/Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B}"
PORT="${PORT:-6008}"
TONGYI_REPLICAS="${TONGYI_REPLICAS:-7}"
TP_SIZE="${TP_SIZE:-8}"
PLANNING_PORTS="${PLANNING_PORTS:-$PORT-$((PORT + TONGYI_REPLICAS - 1))}"
PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITY="${PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITY:-2}"
EMBEDDING_PORT="${EMBEDDING_PORT:-6030}"
SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
REPO_ROOT="$(cd -- "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"
PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-$REPO_ROOT/.venv/bin/python}"
QUERY_FILE="${QUERY_FILE:-topics-qrels/queries.tsv}"
RUN_ROOT="${RUN_ROOT:-runs/qwen3-8b}"
CACHE_ROOT="${CACHE_ROOT:-cache/qwen3-8b}"
RUN_NAME="${RUN_NAME:-tongyi_neuron}"
NUM_THREADS="${NUM_THREADS:-30}"
START_SERVER="${START_SERVER:-1}"
MAX_QUERIES="${MAX_QUERIES:-}"
SERVER_PID=""

cleanup() {
    if [[ -n "$SERVER_PID" ]] && kill -0 "$SERVER_PID" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        kill "$SERVER_PID" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
        wait "$SERVER_PID" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
    fi
}
trap cleanup EXIT

if [[ "$START_SERVER" == "1" ]]; then
    MODEL="$MODEL" \
    FIRST_PORT="$PORT" \
    EMBEDDING_PORT="$EMBEDDING_PORT" \
    TONGYI_REPLICAS="$TONGYI_REPLICAS" \
    TP_SIZE="$TP_SIZE" \
        bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi_cluster.bash" &
    SERVER_PID=$!
    until curl -fsS "http://127.0.0.1:${PORT}/v1/models" >/dev/null; do
        if ! kill -0 "$SERVER_PID" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            wait "$SERVER_PID"
            exit 1
        fi
        sleep 10
    done
fi

args=(
    "$PYTHON_BIN" search_agent/tongyi_client.py
    --model "$MODEL"
    --query "$QUERY_FILE"
    --output-dir "$RUN_ROOT/$RUN_NAME"
    --cache-dir "$CACHE_ROOT/$RUN_NAME"
    --searcher-type faiss
    --index-path "indexes/qwen3-embedding-8b/corpus.shard*.pkl"
    --model-name "Qwen/Qwen3-Embedding-8B"
    --normalize
    --num-threads "$NUM_THREADS"
    --embedding-base-url "http://127.0.0.1:$EMBEDDING_PORT"
    --embedding-timeout 60
    --max-length 1024
    --planning-ports "$PLANNING_PORTS"
    --planning-endpoint-capacity "$PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITY"
    --snippet-max-tokens 512
    --k 5
    --get-document
    --port "$PORT"
)

if [[ -n "$MAX_QUERIES" ]]; then
    args+=(--max-queries "$MAX_QUERIES")
fi

"${args[@]}"

file.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
REPO_ROOT="$(cd -- "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"
MODEL="${MODEL:-Qwen/Qwen3-32B}"
TOKENIZER="${TOKENIZER:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/Qwen/Qwen3-32B}"
FIRST_PORT="${FIRST_PORT:-8032}"
JUDGE_REPLICAS="${JUDGE_REPLICAS:-16}"
TP_SIZE="${TP_SIZE:-4}"
MAX_PARALLEL_STARTS="${MAX_PARALLEL_STARTS:-2}"
LOG_DIR="${LOG_DIR:-$REPO_ROOT/logs/neuron-judge-servers/$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)}"
PIDS=()

if [[ "$JUDGE_REPLICAS" -lt 1 || "$JUDGE_REPLICAS" -gt 16 ]]; then
    echo "JUDGE_REPLICAS must be in 1..16." >&2
    exit 2
fi
if [[ "$TP_SIZE" -lt 1 || $((JUDGE_REPLICAS * TP_SIZE)) -gt 64 ]]; then
    echo "JUDGE_REPLICAS * TP_SIZE must fit in 64 NeuronCores." >&2
    exit 2
fi
if [[ "$MAX_PARALLEL_STARTS" -lt 1 || "$MAX_PARALLEL_STARTS" -gt 2 ]]; then
    echo "MAX_PARALLEL_STARTS must be 1 or 2." >&2
    exit 2
fi
if ! command -v numactl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "numactl is required for Trn2 NUMA placement." >&2
    exit 1
fi
if [[ ! -f "$TOKENIZER/tokenizer_config.json" ]]; then
    echo "Missing Qwen3-32B tokenizer at $TOKENIZER." >&2
    echo "Run download_qwen3_32b_judge.bash first." >&2
    exit 1
fi

cleanup() {
    local pid
    trap - EXIT INT TERM
    for pid in "${PIDS[@]}"; do
        kill "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
    done
    for pid in "${PIDS[@]}"; do
        wait "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
    done
}
trap cleanup EXIT
trap 'exit 130' INT TERM

numa_node_for_core() {
    local core_start="$1"
    if (( core_start <= 15 || core_start >= 48 )); then
        echo 1
    else
        echo 0
    fi
}

wait_ready() {
    local pid="$1"
    local port="$2"
    until curl -fsS "http://127.0.0.1:$port/v1/models" >/dev/null 2>&1; do
        if ! kill -0 "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            set +e
            wait "$pid"
            local status=$?
            set -e
            if [[ "$status" -eq 0 ]]; then
                status=1
            fi
            echo "Judge port $port exited before readiness (status=$status)." >&2
            exit "$status"
        fi
        sleep 10
    done
    echo "Judge port $port is ready."
}

launch_judge() {
    local replica="$1"
    local port=$((FIRST_PORT + replica))
    local core_start=$((replica * TP_SIZE))
    local core_end=$((core_start + TP_SIZE - 1))
    local numa_node
    numa_node="$(numa_node_for_core "$core_start")"

    echo "Starting judge replica $replica: port=$port cores=$core_start-$core_end numa=$numa_node"
    numactl --cpunodebind="$numa_node" --membind="$numa_node" \
        env \
        MODEL="$MODEL" \
        TOKENIZER="$TOKENIZER" \
        PORT="$port" \
        TP_SIZE="$TP_SIZE" \
        NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="$core_start-$core_end" \
        NEURON_REQUIRE_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS=1 \
        bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_qwen3_32b_judge.bash" \
        >"$LOG_DIR/judge-$port.log" 2>&1 &
    LAST_PID=$!
    PIDS+=("$LAST_PID")
}

mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"
echo "Neuron judge logs: $LOG_DIR"

replica=1
while (( replica < JUDGE_REPLICAS )); do
    batch_pids=()
    batch_ports=()
    for ((slot = 0; slot < MAX_PARALLEL_STARTS && replica < JUDGE_REPLICAS; slot++)); do
        launch_judge "$replica"
        batch_pids+=("$LAST_PID")
        batch_ports+=("$((FIRST_PORT + replica))")
        ((replica += 1))
    done
    for index in "${!batch_pids[@]}"; do
        wait_ready "${batch_pids[$index]}" "${batch_ports[$index]}"
    done
done

# FIRST_PORT starts last and is the readiness barrier for the entire cluster.
launch_judge 0
wait_ready "$LAST_PID" "$FIRST_PORT"

echo "All $JUDGE_REPLICAS Qwen3-32B judge replicas are ready."
wait

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
REPO_ROOT="$(cd -- "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"
VENV_DIR="${VENV_DIR:-$REPO_ROOT/.venv-neuron-embedding}"
UV_BIN="${UV_BIN:-$(command -v uv)}"
NEURON_PYPI_URL="${NEURON_PYPI_URL:-https://pip.repos.neuron.amazonaws.com}"
UV_CONCURRENT_DOWNLOADS="${UV_CONCURRENT_DOWNLOADS:-1}"
UV_CONCURRENT_BUILDS="${UV_CONCURRENT_BUILDS:-1}"
UV_CONCURRENT_INSTALLS="${UV_CONCURRENT_INSTALLS:-1}"

# Neuron wheels are large; serialize uv work by default to keep setup memory
# below the host limit. Each setting remains overridable for a larger host.
export UV_CONCURRENT_DOWNLOADS UV_CONCURRENT_BUILDS UV_CONCURRENT_INSTALLS

"$UV_BIN" venv --python 3.10 "$VENV_DIR"
"$UV_BIN" pip install \
    --python "$VENV_DIR/bin/python" \
    --extra-index-url "$NEURON_PYPI_URL" \
    --index-strategy unsafe-best-match \
    "optimum-neuron[neuronx]==0.4.5" \
    "fastapi>=0.115,<1" \
    "uvicorn[standard]>=0.34,<1"

"$VENV_DIR/bin/python" -c '
from importlib.metadata import version
for package in ("optimum-neuron", "torch-neuronx", "neuronx-cc", "transformers"):
    print(f"{package}={version(package)}")
'

30	planning_ports_include() {
31	    local target="$1" item start end
32	    local endpoints=()
33	    IFS=, read -r -a endpoints <<< "$PLANNING_PORTS"
34	    for item in "${endpoints[@]}"; do
35	        if [[ "$item" =~ ^([0-9]+)-([0-9]+)$ ]]; then
36	            start=$((10#${BASH_REMATCH[1]}))
37	            end=$((10#${BASH_REMATCH[2]}))
38	            if (( target >= start && target <= end )); then
39	                return 0
40	            fi
41	        elif [[ "$item" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]] && (( target == 10#$item )); then
42	            return 0
43	        fi
44	    done
45	    return 1
46	}

48	# The current custom artifact cannot chunk a cold prompt whose uncached suffix
49	# exceeds 16k, so only two long trajectories may retain each endpoint's APC
50	# state. Native scheduling uses chunked prefill and may use any replica.
51	PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE="${PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE:-}"
52	if [[ -z "$PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE" ]]; then
53	    if [[ "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" == "native" ]]; then
54	        PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE="request"
55	    else
56	        PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE="trajectory"
57	    fi
58	fi
59	case "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" in
60	    custom | native) ;;
61	    *)
62	        echo "NEURON_SCHEDULER must be custom or native" >&2
63	        exit 2
64	        ;;
65	esac
66	case "$PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE" in
67	    trajectory | affinity | request) ;;
68	    *)
69	        echo "PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE must be trajectory, affinity, or request" >&2
70	        exit 2
71	        ;;
72	esac
73	case "$ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR" in
74	    0 | 1) ;;
75	    *)
76	        echo "ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR must be 0 or 1" >&2
77	        exit 2
78	        ;;
79	esac
80	case "$ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS" in
81	    0 | 1) ;;
82	    *)
83	        echo "ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS must be 0 or 1" >&2
84	        exit 2
85	        ;;
86	esac
87	if [[ "$ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR" == "1" && "$ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS" == "1" ]]; then
88	    echo "Choose either ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR or ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS, not both." >&2
89	    exit 2
90	fi
91	# TP=8, single-sequence artifact produced by compile_tongyi_tp8_s1.bash.
92	DEFAULT_TONGYI_ARTIFACT="$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/9a36595723d1059555571d3bf524fa88a507814a2efbe2917865b6350bb75912"
93	export NEURON_CACHE_TAG="${NEURON_CACHE_TAG:-tongyi-128k-prefix112-tp8-s1}"
94	export NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="${NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS:-$DEFAULT_TONGYI_ARTIFACT}"
95	if [[ "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" == "native" && "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" == "$DEFAULT_TONGYI_ARTIFACT" ]]; then

101	    echo "custom scheduler requires trajectory leases: released KV blocks are evictable, so request or affinity leases can lose a long APC history and kill EngineCore. Use NEURON_SCHEDULER=native for non-trajectory leases." >&2

129	        PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITIES="${PORT}:2,$((PORT + 1)):2,$((PORT + 2)):2,${TP8_SIDECAR_PORT}:1"
130	    fi
131	fi
132	if [[ "$ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS" == "1" ]]; then
133	    if [[ "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" != "custom" || "$PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE" != "trajectory" ]]; then
134	        echo "TP4 sidecars only support custom scheduling with trajectory leases; compile native TP4 artifacts before mixing them with request leases." >&2
135	        exit 2
136	    fi

138	        echo "TP4 sidecars require the 3xTP16, MAX_NUM_SEQS=2 planning topology." >&2

154	        PLANNING_PORTS="$PLANNING_PORTS,$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1,$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2"
155	    elif ! planning_ports_include "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1" \

160	    if [[ -z "$PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITIES" ]]; then
161	        PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITIES="${PORT}:2,$((PORT + 1)):2,$((PORT + 2)):2,${TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1}:1,${TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2}:1"

204	cleanup_pid() {

206	    if [[ -n "$pid" ]] && kill -0 "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
207	        kill "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
208	        wait "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true

223	    [[ "$START_SERVER" == "1" ]] || return 0
224	    [[ "$PLANNING_LOGS_SUMMARIZED" == "0" ]] || return 0

233	    if "$PYTHON_BIN" scripts/neuron_summarize_vllm_logs.py \

235	        --json \
236	        "${logs[@]}" >"$temporary_path"; then
237	        mv -- "$temporary_path" "$summary_path"
238	        echo "Planning slot-duty and vacancy summary: $summary_path"
239	        PLANNING_LOGS_SUMMARIZED=1

241	        rm -f -- "$temporary_path"

282	wait_for_server() {
283	    local pid="$1"
284	    local url="$2"
285	
286	    until curl -fsS "$url" >/dev/null; do
287	        if [[ -n "$pid" ]] && ! kill -0 "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
288	            wait "$pid"
289	            exit 1
290	        fi
291	        sleep 10
292	    done
293	}

295	wait_for_planning_endpoints() {
296	    local item start end port
297	    local endpoints=()
298	    IFS=, read -r -a endpoints <<< "$PLANNING_PORTS"
299	    for item in "${endpoints[@]}"; do
300	        if [[ "$item" =~ ^([0-9]+)-([0-9]+)$ ]]; then
301	            start=$((10#${BASH_REMATCH[1]}))
302	            end=$((10#${BASH_REMATCH[2]}))
303	            if (( start < 1 || end > 65535 || end < start )); then
304	                echo "Invalid planning port range: $item" >&2
305	                exit 2
306	            fi
307	            for ((port = start; port <= end; port++)); do
308	                wait_for_server "" "http://127.0.0.1:${port}/v1/models"
309	            done
310	        elif [[ "$item" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
311	            port=$((10#$item))
312	            if (( port < 1 || port > 65535 )); then
313	                echo "Invalid planning port: $item" >&2
314	                exit 2
315	            fi
316	            wait_for_server "" "http://127.0.0.1:${port}/v1/models"
317	        else
318	            echo "Invalid planning port entry: $item" >&2
319	            exit 2
320	        fi
321	    done
322	}

359	start_tongyi_server() {
360	    if [[ "$START_SERVER" != "1" ]]; then
361	        wait_for_planning_endpoints
362	        wait_for_server "" "http://127.0.0.1:${EMBEDDING_PORT}/health"
363	        return
364	    fi
365	
366	    EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS="--no-async-scheduling${EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS:+ $EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS}" \
367	    MODEL="$MODEL" \
368	    FIRST_PORT="$PORT" \
369	    TONGYI_REPLICAS="$TONGYI_REPLICAS" \
370	    EMBEDDING_PORT="$EMBEDDING_PORT" \
371	    TP_SIZE="$TP_SIZE" \
372	    MAX_MODEL_LEN="$MAX_MODEL_LEN" \
373	    MAX_NUM_SEQS="$MAX_NUM_SEQS" \
374	    NEURON_SCHEDULER="$NEURON_SCHEDULER" \
375	    NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" \
376	    LOG_DIR="$PLANNING_LOG_DIR" \
377	    PLANNING_RESTART_DIR="$PLANNING_RESTART_DIR" \
378	        bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi_cluster.bash" &
379	    TONGYI_PID=$!
380	
381	    for ((replica = 0; replica < TONGYI_REPLICAS; replica++)); do
382	        wait_for_server \
383	            "$TONGYI_PID" \
384	            "http://127.0.0.1:$((PORT + replica))/v1/models"
385	    done
386	    wait_for_server "$TONGYI_PID" "http://127.0.0.1:${EMBEDDING_PORT}/health"
387	
388	    if [[ "$ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR" == "1" ]]; then
389	        local sidecar_log_dir="${TP8_SIDECAR_LOG_DIR:-$PLANNING_LOG_DIR}"
390	        local sidecar_log="$sidecar_log_dir/tongyi-${TP8_SIDECAR_PORT}.log"
391	        mkdir -p "$sidecar_log_dir"
392	        echo "Starting TP8 single-sequence sidecar: port=$TP8_SIDECAR_PORT cores=$TP8_SIDECAR_CORES log=$sidecar_log"
393	        numactl --cpunodebind=1 --membind=1 \
394	            env \
395	            MODEL="$MODEL" \
396	            PORT="$TP8_SIDECAR_PORT" \
397	            TP_SIZE=8 \
398	            MAX_MODEL_LEN=128000 \
399	            MAX_NUM_SEQS=1 \
400	            NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE=4000 \
401	            NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="$TP8_SIDECAR_CORES" \
402	            NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="$TP8_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT" \
403	            NEURON_REQUIRE_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS=1 \
404	            NEURON_SCHEDULER=custom \
405	            ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL=0 \
406	            OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG="" \
407	            NEURON_CACHE_TAG=tongyi-128k-prefix112-tp8-s1 \
408	            EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS="${TP8_SIDECAR_EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS:-}" \
409	            bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi_tp8_s1.bash" \
410	            >"$sidecar_log" 2>&1 &
411	        TP8_SIDECAR_PID=$!
412	        wait_for_server "$TP8_SIDECAR_PID" "http://127.0.0.1:${TP8_SIDECAR_PORT}/v1/models"
413	    fi
414	
415	    if [[ "$ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS" == "1" ]]; then
416	        local sidecar_ports=("$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1" "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2")
417	        local sidecar_cores=("48-51" "52-55")
418	        local index sidecar_port sidecar_cores_for_port sidecar_log
419	
420	        mkdir -p "$PLANNING_LOG_DIR"
421	        for index in "${!sidecar_ports[@]}"; do
422	            sidecar_port="${sidecar_ports[$index]}"
423	            sidecar_cores_for_port="${sidecar_cores[$index]}"
424	            sidecar_log="$PLANNING_LOG_DIR/tongyi-${sidecar_port}.log"
425	            echo "Starting experimental TP4 single-sequence sidecar: port=$sidecar_port cores=$sidecar_cores_for_port log=$sidecar_log"
426	            numactl --cpunodebind=1 --membind=1 \
427	                env \
428	                MODEL="$MODEL" \
429	                PORT="$sidecar_port" \
430	                TP_SIZE=4 \
431	                MAX_MODEL_LEN=128000 \
432	                MAX_NUM_SEQS=1 \
433	                NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE=4000 \
434	                NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="$sidecar_cores_for_port" \
435	                NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="$TP4_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT" \
436	                NEURON_REQUIRE_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS=1 \
437	                NEURON_SCHEDULER=custom \
438	                ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL=0 \
439	                OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG='{"enable_bucketing":true,"seq_len":128000,"max_context_length":128000,"context_encoding_buckets":[8192],"prefix_buckets":[122880],"token_generation_buckets":[16384,32768,65536,98304,128000],"save_sharded_checkpoint":true,"blockwise_matmul_config":{"use_shard_on_intermediate_dynamic_while":true}}' \
440	                NEURON_CACHE_TAG=tongyi-128k-prefix120-tp4-s1 \
441	                EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS="${TP4_SIDECAR_EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS:-}" \
442	                bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi.bash" \
443	                >"$sidecar_log" 2>&1 &
444	            TP4_SIDECAR_PIDS+=("$!")
445	            wait_for_server "${TP4_SIDECAR_PIDS[$index]}" "http://127.0.0.1:${sidecar_port}/v1/models"
446	        done
447	    fi
448	}

525	        --qrel-golds-path "$qrel_dir/qrel_golds.txt" \
526	        --filter-all \
527	        "${max_query_args[@]}"
528	}
529	
530	# Previous full-qrels filter-non-positive runner.
531	# run_tongyi() {

533	#     local output_dir

555	#         --model "$MODEL" \
556	#         --query "$QUERY_FILE" \

558	#         --cache-dir "$cache_dir" \

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
REPO_ROOT="$(cd -- "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"
cd -- "$REPO_ROOT"

MODEL="${MODEL:-Alibaba-NLP/Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B}"
PORT="${PORT:-6008}"
TONGYI_REPLICAS="${TONGYI_REPLICAS:-7}"
PLANNING_PORTS_WAS_SET="${PLANNING_PORTS:+1}"
PLANNING_PORTS="${PLANNING_PORTS:-$PORT-$((PORT + TONGYI_REPLICAS - 1))}"
PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITY="${PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITY:-1}"
PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITIES="${PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITIES:-}"
PLANNING_AFFINITY_TIMEOUT="${PLANNING_AFFINITY_TIMEOUT:-0.2}"
EMBEDDING_PORT="${EMBEDDING_PORT:-6030}"
TP_SIZE="${TP_SIZE:-8}"
MAX_MODEL_LEN="${MAX_MODEL_LEN:-128000}"
MAX_NUM_SEQS="${MAX_NUM_SEQS:-1}"
NEURON_SCHEDULER="${NEURON_SCHEDULER:-custom}"
ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR="${ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR:-0}"
TP8_SIDECAR_PORT="${TP8_SIDECAR_PORT:-$((PORT + TONGYI_REPLICAS))}"
TP8_SIDECAR_CORES="48-55"
TP8_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT="${TP8_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/9a36595723d1059555571d3bf524fa88a507814a2efbe2917865b6350bb75912}"
ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS="${ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS:-0}"
TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1="${TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1:-$((PORT + TONGYI_REPLICAS))}"
TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2="${TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2:-$((PORT + TONGYI_REPLICAS + 1))}"
TP4_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT="${TP4_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT:-$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/27b98ea6f3cabed3fd9ed630d1a2996e28998618d11e43538edbd3d3e09c3586}"

planning_ports_include() {
    local target="$1" item start end
    local endpoints=()
    IFS=, read -r -a endpoints <<< "$PLANNING_PORTS"
    for item in "${endpoints[@]}"; do
        if [[ "$item" =~ ^([0-9]+)-([0-9]+)$ ]]; then
            start=$((10#${BASH_REMATCH[1]}))
            end=$((10#${BASH_REMATCH[2]}))
            if (( target >= start && target <= end )); then
                return 0
            fi
        elif [[ "$item" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]] && (( target == 10#$item )); then
            return 0
        fi
    done
    return 1
}

# The current custom artifact cannot chunk a cold prompt whose uncached suffix
# exceeds 16k, so only two long trajectories may retain each endpoint's APC
# state. Native scheduling uses chunked prefill and may use any replica.
PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE="${PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE:-}"
if [[ -z "$PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE" ]]; then
    if [[ "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" == "native" ]]; then
        PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE="request"
    else
        PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE="trajectory"
    fi
fi
case "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" in
    custom | native) ;;
    *)
        echo "NEURON_SCHEDULER must be custom or native" >&2
        exit 2
        ;;
esac
case "$PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE" in
    trajectory | affinity | request) ;;
    *)
        echo "PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE must be trajectory, affinity, or request" >&2
        exit 2
        ;;
esac
case "$ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR" in
    0 | 1) ;;
    *)
        echo "ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR must be 0 or 1" >&2
        exit 2
        ;;
esac
case "$ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS" in
    0 | 1) ;;
    *)
        echo "ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS must be 0 or 1" >&2
        exit 2
        ;;
esac
if [[ "$ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR" == "1" && "$ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS" == "1" ]]; then
    echo "Choose either ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR or ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS, not both." >&2
    exit 2
fi
# TP=8, single-sequence artifact produced by compile_tongyi_tp8_s1.bash.
DEFAULT_TONGYI_ARTIFACT="$REPO_ROOT/local-models/neuron-compiled-artifacts/9a36595723d1059555571d3bf524fa88a507814a2efbe2917865b6350bb75912"
export NEURON_CACHE_TAG="${NEURON_CACHE_TAG:-tongyi-128k-prefix112-tp8-s1}"
export NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="${NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS:-$DEFAULT_TONGYI_ARTIFACT}"
if [[ "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" == "native" && "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" == "$DEFAULT_TONGYI_ARTIFACT" ]]; then
    echo "NEURON_SCHEDULER=native requires a separately compiled native artifact; set NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS." >&2
    exit 2
fi
if [[ "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" == "custom" \
    && ( "$PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE" == "request" || "$PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE" == "affinity" ) ]]; then
    echo "custom scheduler requires trajectory leases: released KV blocks are evictable, so request or affinity leases can lose a long APC history and kill EngineCore. Use NEURON_SCHEDULER=native for non-trajectory leases." >&2
    exit 2
fi
if [[ ! -f "$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS/model.pt" ]]; then
    echo "No complete Tongyi artifact at: $NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" >&2
    echo "Compile the matching scheduler profile before starting runtime replicas." >&2
    exit 2
fi
if [[ "$ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR" == "1" ]]; then
    if [[ "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" != "custom" || "$PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE" != "trajectory" ]]; then
        echo "TP8 sidecar only supports custom scheduling with trajectory leases; compile a native TP8 artifact before mixing it with request leases." >&2
        exit 2
    fi
    if [[ "$TP_SIZE" != "16" || "$TONGYI_REPLICAS" != "3" || "$MAX_NUM_SEQS" != "2" ]]; then
        echo "TP8 sidecar requires the 3xTP16, MAX_NUM_SEQS=2 planning topology." >&2
        exit 2
    fi
    if [[ ! -f "$TP8_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT/model.pt" ]]; then
        echo "No complete TP8 sidecar artifact at: $TP8_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT" >&2
        exit 2
    fi
    if [[ -z "$PLANNING_PORTS_WAS_SET" ]]; then
        PLANNING_PORTS="$PLANNING_PORTS,$TP8_SIDECAR_PORT"
    elif ! planning_ports_include "$TP8_SIDECAR_PORT"; then
        echo "PLANNING_PORTS must include TP8_SIDECAR_PORT=$TP8_SIDECAR_PORT when ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR=1." >&2
        exit 2
    fi
    if [[ -z "$PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITIES" ]]; then
        PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITIES="${PORT}:2,$((PORT + 1)):2,$((PORT + 2)):2,${TP8_SIDECAR_PORT}:1"
    fi
fi
if [[ "$ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS" == "1" ]]; then
    if [[ "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" != "custom" || "$PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE" != "trajectory" ]]; then
        echo "TP4 sidecars only support custom scheduling with trajectory leases; compile native TP4 artifacts before mixing them with request leases." >&2
        exit 2
    fi
    if [[ "$TP_SIZE" != "16" || "$TONGYI_REPLICAS" != "3" || "$MAX_NUM_SEQS" != "2" ]]; then
        echo "TP4 sidecars require the 3xTP16, MAX_NUM_SEQS=2 planning topology." >&2
        exit 2
    fi
    if [[ ! "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1" =~ ^[1-9][0-9]*$ ]] \
        || [[ ! "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2" =~ ^[1-9][0-9]*$ ]] \
        || (( TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1 > 65535 || TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2 > 65535 )) \
        || [[ "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1" == "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2" ]]; then
        echo "TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1 and TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2 must be distinct ports in 1..65535." >&2
        exit 2
    fi
    if [[ ! -f "$TP4_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT/model.pt" ]]; then
        echo "No complete TP4 sidecar artifact at: $TP4_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT" >&2
        echo "Smoke the TP4 artifact before using this experimental topology." >&2
        exit 2
    fi
    if [[ -z "$PLANNING_PORTS_WAS_SET" ]]; then
        PLANNING_PORTS="$PLANNING_PORTS,$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1,$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2"
    elif ! planning_ports_include "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1" \
        || ! planning_ports_include "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2"; then
        echo "PLANNING_PORTS must include both TP4 sidecar ports when ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS=1." >&2
        exit 2
    fi
    if [[ -z "$PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITIES" ]]; then
        PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITIES="${PORT}:2,$((PORT + 1)):2,$((PORT + 2)):2,${TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1}:1,${TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2}:1"
    fi
fi
PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-$REPO_ROOT/.venv/bin/python}"
NUM_THREADS="${NUM_THREADS:-$((TONGYI_REPLICAS * 2))}"
RUN_EVAL="${RUN_EVAL:-1}"
EVAL_BATCH_SIZE="${EVAL_BATCH_SIZE:-32}"
MAX_QUERIES="${MAX_QUERIES:-}"
RUN_NAME="${RUN_NAME:-tongyi_filter_all_no_get}"
QREL_RUNS=(8 4 full)
# Previous full-qrels filter-non-positive variants. Keep as reference; this
# script now runs filter_all on 1/8, then 1/4, then the full qrels.
# VARIANTS="${VARIANTS:-saturate refer}"

START_SERVER="${START_SERVER:-1}"
START_JUDGE_SERVER="${START_JUDGE_SERVER:-1}"
JUDGE_MODEL="${JUDGE_MODEL:-Qwen/Qwen3-32B}"
JUDGE_PORT="${JUDGE_PORT:-8032}"
JUDGE_REPLICAS="${JUDGE_REPLICAS:-16}"
JUDGE_TP_SIZE="${JUDGE_TP_SIZE:-4}"
JUDGE_MAX_MODEL_LEN="${JUDGE_MAX_MODEL_LEN:-8192}"
JUDGE_MAX_NUM_SEQS="${JUDGE_MAX_NUM_SEQS:-1}"
JUDGE_NUM_THREADS="${JUDGE_NUM_THREADS:-16}"
JUDGE_BASE_URLS="${JUDGE_BASE_URLS:-}"

RUN_ROOT="${RUN_ROOT:-runs/qwen3-8b}"
CACHE_ROOT="${CACHE_ROOT:-cache/qwen3-8b}"
PLANNING_LOG_DIR="${PLANNING_LOG_DIR:-$REPO_ROOT/logs/neuron-servers/$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)}"
PLANNING_RESTART_DIR="${PLANNING_RESTART_DIR:-$PLANNING_LOG_DIR/restarts}"
PLANNING_RESTART_TIMEOUT_SECONDS="${PLANNING_RESTART_TIMEOUT_SECONDS:-600}"
PLANNING_QUERY_RETRY_LIMIT="${PLANNING_QUERY_RETRY_LIMIT:-2}"
PLANNING_MAX_UNCACHED_PREFILL_TOKENS="${PLANNING_MAX_UNCACHED_PREFILL_TOKENS:-}"
if [[ -z "$PLANNING_MAX_UNCACHED_PREFILL_TOKENS" && "$NEURON_SCHEDULER" == "custom" ]]; then
    PLANNING_MAX_UNCACHED_PREFILL_TOKENS=16384
fi
SUMMARIZE_NEURON_LOGS="${SUMMARIZE_NEURON_LOGS:-1}"

TONGYI_PID=""
TP8_SIDECAR_PID=""
TP4_SIDECAR_PIDS=()
JUDGE_PID=""
PLANNING_LOGS_SUMMARIZED=0

cleanup_pid() {
    local pid="$1"
    if [[ -n "$pid" ]] && kill -0 "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        kill "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
        wait "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
    fi
}

cleanup_pids() {
    local pid
    for pid in "$@"; do
        cleanup_pid "$pid"
    done
}

summarize_planning_logs() {
    local log logs=() summary_path temporary_path

    [[ "$SUMMARIZE_NEURON_LOGS" == "1" ]] || return 0
    [[ "$START_SERVER" == "1" ]] || return 0
    [[ "$PLANNING_LOGS_SUMMARIZED" == "0" ]] || return 0

    for log in "$PLANNING_LOG_DIR"/tongyi-*.log; do
        [[ -f "$log" ]] && logs+=("$log")
    done
    (( ${#logs[@]} > 0 )) || return 0

    summary_path="$PLANNING_LOG_DIR/planning_core_time.json"
    temporary_path="$summary_path.tmp.$$"
    if "$PYTHON_BIN" scripts/neuron_summarize_vllm_logs.py \
        --year "$(date -u +%Y)" \
        --json \
        "${logs[@]}" >"$temporary_path"; then
        mv -- "$temporary_path" "$summary_path"
        echo "Planning slot-duty and vacancy summary: $summary_path"
        PLANNING_LOGS_SUMMARIZED=1
    else
        rm -f -- "$temporary_path"
        echo "WARNING: could not summarize planning logs under $PLANNING_LOG_DIR" >&2
    fi
}

cleanup() {
    cleanup_pid "$TONGYI_PID"
    cleanup_pid "$TP8_SIDECAR_PID"
    cleanup_pids "${TP4_SIDECAR_PIDS[@]}"
    summarize_planning_logs
    cleanup_pid "$JUDGE_PID"
}
trap cleanup EXIT
trap 'exit 130' INT TERM

qrel_dir_for_run() {
    case "$1" in
        8 | 4) printf "topics-qrels/topics-qrels-%s\n" "$1" ;;
        full) printf "%s\n" "topics-qrels" ;;
        *) echo "Unknown qrel run: $1" >&2; return 1 ;;
    esac
}

qrel_label_for_run() {
    case "$1" in
        8 | 4) printf "%sqrel\n" "$1" ;;
        full) printf "%s\n" "full" ;;
        *) echo "Unknown qrel run: $1" >&2; return 1 ;;
    esac
}

for qrel_run in "${QREL_RUNS[@]}"; do
    qrel_dir="$(qrel_dir_for_run "$qrel_run")"
    for required_file in queries.tsv qrel_evidence.txt qrel_golds.txt; do
        if [[ ! -f "$qrel_dir/$required_file" ]]; then
            echo "Missing required file: $qrel_dir/$required_file" >&2
            exit 1
        fi
    done
done

wait_for_server() {
    local pid="$1"
    local url="$2"

    until curl -fsS "$url" >/dev/null; do
        if [[ -n "$pid" ]] && ! kill -0 "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            wait "$pid"
            exit 1
        fi
        sleep 10
    done
}

wait_for_planning_endpoints() {
    local item start end port
    local endpoints=()
    IFS=, read -r -a endpoints <<< "$PLANNING_PORTS"
    for item in "${endpoints[@]}"; do
        if [[ "$item" =~ ^([0-9]+)-([0-9]+)$ ]]; then
            start=$((10#${BASH_REMATCH[1]}))
            end=$((10#${BASH_REMATCH[2]}))
            if (( start < 1 || end > 65535 || end < start )); then
                echo "Invalid planning port range: $item" >&2
                exit 2
            fi
            for ((port = start; port <= end; port++)); do
                wait_for_server "" "http://127.0.0.1:${port}/v1/models"
            done
        elif [[ "$item" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
            port=$((10#$item))
            if (( port < 1 || port > 65535 )); then
                echo "Invalid planning port: $item" >&2
                exit 2
            fi
            wait_for_server "" "http://127.0.0.1:${port}/v1/models"
        else
            echo "Invalid planning port entry: $item" >&2
            exit 2
        fi
    done
}

if [[ -z "$JUDGE_BASE_URLS" ]]; then
    judge_urls=()
    for ((replica = 0; replica < JUDGE_REPLICAS; replica++)); do
        judge_urls+=("http://127.0.0.1:$((JUDGE_PORT + replica))/v1")
    done
    JUDGE_BASE_URLS="$(IFS=,; echo "${judge_urls[*]}")"
fi

wait_for_url_list() {
    local raw_urls="$1"
    local urls=()
    local url
    IFS=, read -r -a urls <<< "$raw_urls"
    for url in "${urls[@]}"; do
        wait_for_server "" "${url%/}/models"
    done
}

# Previous full-qrels output layout for filter-non-positive variants.
# variant_output_dir() {
#     case "$1" in
#         saturated | saturate) echo "$RUN_ROOT/tongyi_res_saturated" ;;
#         refer) echo "$RUN_ROOT/tongyi_res_refer" ;;
#         *) echo "Unknown variant: $1" >&2; return 1 ;;
#     esac
# }
#
# variant_cache_dir() {
#     case "$1" in
#         saturated | saturate) echo "$CACHE_ROOT/tongyi_res_saturated" ;;
#         refer) echo "$CACHE_ROOT/tongyi_res_refer" ;;
#         *) echo "Unknown variant: $1" >&2; return 1 ;;
#     esac
# }

start_tongyi_server() {
    if [[ "$START_SERVER" != "1" ]]; then
        wait_for_planning_endpoints
        wait_for_server "" "http://127.0.0.1:${EMBEDDING_PORT}/health"
        return
    fi

    EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS="--no-async-scheduling${EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS:+ $EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS}" \
    MODEL="$MODEL" \
    FIRST_PORT="$PORT" \
    TONGYI_REPLICAS="$TONGYI_REPLICAS" \
    EMBEDDING_PORT="$EMBEDDING_PORT" \
    TP_SIZE="$TP_SIZE" \
    MAX_MODEL_LEN="$MAX_MODEL_LEN" \
    MAX_NUM_SEQS="$MAX_NUM_SEQS" \
    NEURON_SCHEDULER="$NEURON_SCHEDULER" \
    NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="$NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS" \
    LOG_DIR="$PLANNING_LOG_DIR" \
    PLANNING_RESTART_DIR="$PLANNING_RESTART_DIR" \
        bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi_cluster.bash" &
    TONGYI_PID=$!

    for ((replica = 0; replica < TONGYI_REPLICAS; replica++)); do
        wait_for_server \
            "$TONGYI_PID" \
            "http://127.0.0.1:$((PORT + replica))/v1/models"
    done
    wait_for_server "$TONGYI_PID" "http://127.0.0.1:${EMBEDDING_PORT}/health"

    if [[ "$ENABLE_TP8_SIDECAR" == "1" ]]; then
        local sidecar_log_dir="${TP8_SIDECAR_LOG_DIR:-$PLANNING_LOG_DIR}"
        local sidecar_log="$sidecar_log_dir/tongyi-${TP8_SIDECAR_PORT}.log"
        mkdir -p "$sidecar_log_dir"
        echo "Starting TP8 single-sequence sidecar: port=$TP8_SIDECAR_PORT cores=$TP8_SIDECAR_CORES log=$sidecar_log"
        numactl --cpunodebind=1 --membind=1 \
            env \
            MODEL="$MODEL" \
            PORT="$TP8_SIDECAR_PORT" \
            TP_SIZE=8 \
            MAX_MODEL_LEN=128000 \
            MAX_NUM_SEQS=1 \
            NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE=4000 \
            NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="$TP8_SIDECAR_CORES" \
            NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="$TP8_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT" \
            NEURON_REQUIRE_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS=1 \
            NEURON_SCHEDULER=custom \
            ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL=0 \
            OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG="" \
            NEURON_CACHE_TAG=tongyi-128k-prefix112-tp8-s1 \
            EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS="${TP8_SIDECAR_EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS:-}" \
            bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi_tp8_s1.bash" \
            >"$sidecar_log" 2>&1 &
        TP8_SIDECAR_PID=$!
        wait_for_server "$TP8_SIDECAR_PID" "http://127.0.0.1:${TP8_SIDECAR_PORT}/v1/models"
    fi

    if [[ "$ENABLE_TP4_SIDECARS" == "1" ]]; then
        local sidecar_ports=("$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_1" "$TP4_SIDECAR_PORT_2")
        local sidecar_cores=("48-51" "52-55")
        local index sidecar_port sidecar_cores_for_port sidecar_log

        mkdir -p "$PLANNING_LOG_DIR"
        for index in "${!sidecar_ports[@]}"; do
            sidecar_port="${sidecar_ports[$index]}"
            sidecar_cores_for_port="${sidecar_cores[$index]}"
            sidecar_log="$PLANNING_LOG_DIR/tongyi-${sidecar_port}.log"
            echo "Starting experimental TP4 single-sequence sidecar: port=$sidecar_port cores=$sidecar_cores_for_port log=$sidecar_log"
            numactl --cpunodebind=1 --membind=1 \
                env \
                MODEL="$MODEL" \
                PORT="$sidecar_port" \
                TP_SIZE=4 \
                MAX_MODEL_LEN=128000 \
                MAX_NUM_SEQS=1 \
                NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE=4000 \
                NEURON_RT_VISIBLE_CORES="$sidecar_cores_for_port" \
                NEURON_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS="$TP4_SIDECAR_ARTIFACT" \
                NEURON_REQUIRE_COMPILED_ARTIFACTS=1 \
                NEURON_SCHEDULER=custom \
                ENABLE_CHUNKED_PREFILL=0 \
                OVERRIDE_NEURON_CONFIG='{"enable_bucketing":true,"seq_len":128000,"max_context_length":128000,"context_encoding_buckets":[8192],"prefix_buckets":[122880],"token_generation_buckets":[16384,32768,65536,98304,128000],"save_sharded_checkpoint":true,"blockwise_matmul_config":{"use_shard_on_intermediate_dynamic_while":true}}' \
                NEURON_CACHE_TAG=tongyi-128k-prefix120-tp4-s1 \
                EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS="${TP4_SIDECAR_EXTRA_VLLM_ARGS:-}" \
                bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi.bash" \
                >"$sidecar_log" 2>&1 &
            TP4_SIDECAR_PIDS+=("$!")
            wait_for_server "${TP4_SIDECAR_PIDS[$index]}" "http://127.0.0.1:${sidecar_port}/v1/models"
        done
    fi
}

start_judge_server() {
    if [[ "$START_JUDGE_SERVER" != "1" ]]; then
        wait_for_url_list "$JUDGE_BASE_URLS"
        return
    fi

    MODEL="$JUDGE_MODEL" \
    FIRST_PORT="$JUDGE_PORT" \
    JUDGE_REPLICAS="$JUDGE_REPLICAS" \
    TP_SIZE="$JUDGE_TP_SIZE" \
    MAX_MODEL_LEN="$JUDGE_MAX_MODEL_LEN" \
    MAX_NUM_SEQS="$JUDGE_MAX_NUM_SEQS" \
        bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_qwen3_32b_judge_cluster.bash" &
    JUDGE_PID=$!

    # JUDGE_PORT starts last and is the readiness barrier for the full cluster.
    wait_for_server "$JUDGE_PID" "http://127.0.0.1:${JUDGE_PORT}/v1/models"
}

run_filter_all_tongyi() {
    local qrel_run="$1"
    local qrel_dir
    local qrel_label
    qrel_dir="$(qrel_dir_for_run "$qrel_run")"
    qrel_label="$(qrel_label_for_run "$qrel_run")"
    local output_dir="$RUN_ROOT/$qrel_label/$RUN_NAME"
    local cache_dir="$CACHE_ROOT/$qrel_label/$RUN_NAME"
    local max_query_args=()
    local endpoint_capacity_args=()
    local restart_args=()
    local prefix_guard_args=()

    if [[ -n "$MAX_QUERIES" ]]; then
        max_query_args=(--max-queries "$MAX_QUERIES")
    fi
    if [[ -n "$PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITIES" ]]; then
        endpoint_capacity_args=(--planning-endpoint-capacities "$PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITIES")
    fi
    if [[ "$START_SERVER" == "1" ]]; then
        restart_args=(
            --planning-restart-dir "$PLANNING_RESTART_DIR"
            --planning-restart-timeout-seconds "$PLANNING_RESTART_TIMEOUT_SECONDS"
            --planning-query-retry-limit "$PLANNING_QUERY_RETRY_LIMIT"
        )
    fi
    if [[ -n "$PLANNING_MAX_UNCACHED_PREFILL_TOKENS" ]]; then
        prefix_guard_args=(--planning-max-uncached-prefill-tokens "$PLANNING_MAX_UNCACHED_PREFILL_TOKENS")
    fi

    echo "Running filter_all Tongyi on $qrel_label without get_document on planning ports $PLANNING_PORTS"
    echo "Neuron embedding endpoint: http://127.0.0.1:$EMBEDDING_PORT"
    "$PYTHON_BIN" search_agent/tongyi_client.py \
        --model "$MODEL" \
        --query "$qrel_dir/queries.tsv" \
        --output-dir "$output_dir" \
        --cache-dir "$cache_dir" \
        --searcher-type faiss \
        --index-path "indexes/qwen3-embedding-8b/corpus.shard*.pkl" \
        --model-name "Qwen/Qwen3-Embedding-8B" \
        --normalize \
        --num-threads "$NUM_THREADS" \
        --embedding-base-url "http://127.0.0.1:$EMBEDDING_PORT" \
        --embedding-timeout 60 \
        --max-length 1024 \
        --planning-ports "$PLANNING_PORTS" \
        --planning-endpoint-capacity "$PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITY" \
        "${endpoint_capacity_args[@]}" \
        --planning-lease-scope "$PLANNING_LEASE_SCOPE" \
        --planning-affinity-timeout "$PLANNING_AFFINITY_TIMEOUT" \
        "${restart_args[@]}" \
        "${prefix_guard_args[@]}" \
        --snippet-max-tokens 512 \
        --k 5 \
        --port "$PORT" \
        --qrel-evidence-path "$qrel_dir/qrel_evidence.txt" \
        --qrel-golds-path "$qrel_dir/qrel_golds.txt" \
        --filter-all \
        "${max_query_args[@]}"
}

# Previous full-qrels filter-non-positive runner.
# run_tongyi() {
#     local variant="$1"
#     local output_dir
#     local cache_dir
#     local extra_args=()
#
#     output_dir="$(variant_output_dir "$variant")"
#     cache_dir="$(variant_cache_dir "$variant")"
#
#     case "$variant" in
#         saturated | saturate)
#             extra_args=(--filter-non-positive --id-title-marker --filtered-empty-response saturated)
#             ;;
#         refer)
#             extra_args=(--filter-non-positive --id-title-marker --filtered-empty-response refer-to-context)
#             ;;
#         *)
#             echo "Unknown variant: $variant" >&2
#             return 1
#             ;;
#     esac
#
#     echo "Running $variant on full qrels with Neuron server at port $PORT"
#     "$PYTHON_BIN" search_agent/tongyi_client.py \
#         --model "$MODEL" \
#         --query "$QUERY_FILE" \
#         --output-dir "$output_dir" \
#         --cache-dir "$cache_dir" \
#         --searcher-type faiss \
#         --index-path "indexes/qwen3-embedding-8b/corpus.shard*.pkl" \
#         --model-name "Qwen/Qwen3-Embedding-8B" \
#         --normalize \
#         --num-threads "$NUM_THREADS" \
#         --snippet-max-tokens 512 \
#         --k 5 \
#         --get-document \
#         --port "$PORT" \
#         --qrel-evidence-path "$QREL_EVIDENCE_FILE" \
#         --qrel-golds-path "$QREL_GOLDS_FILE" \
#         "${extra_args[@]}"
# }

start_tongyi_server

for qrel_run in "${QREL_RUNS[@]}"; do
    run_filter_all_tongyi "$qrel_run"
done

# for variant in $VARIANTS; do
#     run_tongyi "$variant"
# done

cleanup_pid "$TONGYI_PID"
TONGYI_PID=""
cleanup_pid "$TP8_SIDECAR_PID"
TP8_SIDECAR_PID=""
cleanup_pids "${TP4_SIDECAR_PIDS[@]}"
TP4_SIDECAR_PIDS=()
summarize_planning_logs

if [[ "$RUN_EVAL" == "1" ]]; then
    start_judge_server

    for qrel_run in "${QREL_RUNS[@]}"; do
        qrel_dir="$(qrel_dir_for_run "$qrel_run")"
        qrel_label="$(qrel_label_for_run "$qrel_run")"
        "$PYTHON_BIN" scripts_evaluation/evaluate_run.py \
            --input_dir "$RUN_ROOT/$qrel_label/$RUN_NAME" \
            --qrel_evidence "$qrel_dir/qrel_evidence.txt" \
            --model "$JUDGE_MODEL" \
            --judge-backend openai-compatible \
            --judge-base-urls "$JUDGE_BASE_URLS" \
            --judge-num-threads "$JUDGE_NUM_THREADS" \
            --batch_size "$EVAL_BATCH_SIZE"
    done

    # for variant in $VARIANTS; do
    #     "$PYTHON_BIN" scripts_evaluation/evaluate_run.py \
    #         --input_dir "$(variant_output_dir "$variant")" \
    #         --qrel_evidence "$QREL_EVIDENCE_FILE" \

fi

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
REPO_ROOT="$(cd -- "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"
cd -- "$REPO_ROOT"

MODEL="${MODEL:-Alibaba-NLP/Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B}"
PORT="${PORT:-6008}"
TONGYI_REPLICAS="${TONGYI_REPLICAS:-7}"
PLANNING_PORTS="${PLANNING_PORTS:-$PORT-$((PORT + TONGYI_REPLICAS - 1))}"
PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITY="${PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITY:-2}"
EMBEDDING_PORT="${EMBEDDING_PORT:-6030}"
TP_SIZE="${TP_SIZE:-8}"
MAX_MODEL_LEN="${MAX_MODEL_LEN:-128000}"
MAX_NUM_SEQS="${MAX_NUM_SEQS:-2}"
DOCUMENT_CHUNK_TOKENS="${DOCUMENT_CHUNK_TOKENS:-12000}"
PYTHON_BIN="${PYTHON_BIN:-$REPO_ROOT/.venv/bin/python}"
NUM_THREADS="${NUM_THREADS:-30}"
RUN_EVAL="${RUN_EVAL:-1}"
EVAL_BATCH_SIZE="${EVAL_BATCH_SIZE:-32}"
MAX_QUERIES="${MAX_QUERIES:-}"
RUN_NAME="${RUN_NAME:-tongyi_filter_all_get}"
# Previous full-qrels filter-non-positive variants. Keep as reference; this
# script now defaults to the basic filter_all experiment on topics-qrels-8.
# VARIANTS="${VARIANTS:-saturate refer}"

START_SERVER="${START_SERVER:-1}"
START_JUDGE_SERVER="${START_JUDGE_SERVER:-1}"
JUDGE_MODEL="${JUDGE_MODEL:-Qwen/Qwen3-32B}"
JUDGE_PORT="${JUDGE_PORT:-8032}"
JUDGE_REPLICAS="${JUDGE_REPLICAS:-16}"
JUDGE_TP_SIZE="${JUDGE_TP_SIZE:-4}"
JUDGE_MAX_MODEL_LEN="${JUDGE_MAX_MODEL_LEN:-8192}"
JUDGE_MAX_NUM_SEQS="${JUDGE_MAX_NUM_SEQS:-1}"
JUDGE_NUM_THREADS="${JUDGE_NUM_THREADS:-16}"
JUDGE_BASE_URLS="${JUDGE_BASE_URLS:-}"

QUERY_FILE="${QUERY_FILE:-topics-qrels/topics-qrels-8/queries.tsv}"
QREL_EVIDENCE_FILE="${QREL_EVIDENCE_FILE:-topics-qrels/topics-qrels-8/qrel_evidence.txt}"
QREL_GOLDS_FILE="${QREL_GOLDS_FILE:-topics-qrels/topics-qrels-8/qrel_golds.txt}"
RUN_ROOT="${RUN_ROOT:-runs/qwen3-8b}"
CACHE_ROOT="${CACHE_ROOT:-cache/qwen3-8b}"

TONGYI_PID=""
JUDGE_PID=""

cleanup_pid() {
    local pid="$1"
    if [[ -n "$pid" ]] && kill -0 "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        kill "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
        wait "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
    fi
}

cleanup() {
    cleanup_pid "$TONGYI_PID"
    cleanup_pid "$JUDGE_PID"
}
trap cleanup EXIT
trap 'exit 130' INT TERM

for required_file in "$QUERY_FILE" "$QREL_EVIDENCE_FILE" "$QREL_GOLDS_FILE"; do
    if [[ ! -f "$required_file" ]]; then
        echo "Missing required file: $required_file" >&2
        exit 1
    fi
done

wait_for_server() {
    local pid="$1"
    local url="$2"

    until curl -fsS "$url" >/dev/null; do
        if [[ -n "$pid" ]] && ! kill -0 "$pid" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            wait "$pid"
            exit 1
        fi
        sleep 10
    done
}

if [[ -z "$JUDGE_BASE_URLS" ]]; then
    judge_urls=()
    for ((replica = 0; replica < JUDGE_REPLICAS; replica++)); do
        judge_urls+=("http://127.0.0.1:$((JUDGE_PORT + replica))/v1")
    done
    JUDGE_BASE_URLS="$(IFS=,; echo "${judge_urls[*]}")"
fi

wait_for_url_list() {
    local raw_urls="$1"
    local urls=()
    local url
    IFS=, read -r -a urls <<< "$raw_urls"
    for url in "${urls[@]}"; do
        wait_for_server "" "${url%/}/models"
    done
}

# Previous full-qrels output layout for filter-non-positive variants.
# variant_output_dir() {
#     case "$1" in
#         saturated | saturate) echo "$RUN_ROOT/tongyi_res_saturated" ;;
#         refer) echo "$RUN_ROOT/tongyi_res_refer" ;;
#         *) echo "Unknown variant: $1" >&2; return 1 ;;
#     esac
# }
#
# variant_cache_dir() {
#     case "$1" in
#         saturated | saturate) echo "$CACHE_ROOT/tongyi_res_saturated" ;;
#         refer) echo "$CACHE_ROOT/tongyi_res_refer" ;;
#         *) echo "Unknown variant: $1" >&2; return 1 ;;
#     esac
# }

start_tongyi_server() {
    if [[ "$START_SERVER" != "1" ]]; then
        for ((replica = 0; replica < TONGYI_REPLICAS; replica++)); do
            wait_for_server "" "http://127.0.0.1:$((PORT + replica))/v1/models"
        done
        wait_for_server "" "http://127.0.0.1:${EMBEDDING_PORT}/health"
        return
    fi

    MODEL="$MODEL" \
    FIRST_PORT="$PORT" \
    TONGYI_REPLICAS="$TONGYI_REPLICAS" \
    EMBEDDING_PORT="$EMBEDDING_PORT" \
    TP_SIZE="$TP_SIZE" \
    MAX_MODEL_LEN="$MAX_MODEL_LEN" \
    MAX_NUM_SEQS="$MAX_NUM_SEQS" \
        bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_tongyi_cluster.bash" &
    TONGYI_PID=$!

    # FIRST_PORT starts last and is the readiness barrier for the full cluster.
    wait_for_server "$TONGYI_PID" "http://127.0.0.1:${PORT}/v1/models"
}

start_judge_server() {
    if [[ "$START_JUDGE_SERVER" != "1" ]]; then
        wait_for_url_list "$JUDGE_BASE_URLS"
        return
    fi

    MODEL="$JUDGE_MODEL" \
    FIRST_PORT="$JUDGE_PORT" \
    JUDGE_REPLICAS="$JUDGE_REPLICAS" \
    TP_SIZE="$JUDGE_TP_SIZE" \
    MAX_MODEL_LEN="$JUDGE_MAX_MODEL_LEN" \
    MAX_NUM_SEQS="$JUDGE_MAX_NUM_SEQS" \
        bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/serve_qwen3_32b_judge_cluster.bash" &
    JUDGE_PID=$!

    # JUDGE_PORT starts last and is the readiness barrier for the full cluster.
    wait_for_server "$JUDGE_PID" "http://127.0.0.1:${JUDGE_PORT}/v1/models"
}

run_filter_all_tongyi() {
    local output_dir="$RUN_ROOT/8qrel/$RUN_NAME"
    local cache_dir="$CACHE_ROOT/8qrel/$RUN_NAME"
    local max_query_args=()

    if [[ -n "$MAX_QUERIES" ]]; then
        max_query_args=(--max-queries "$MAX_QUERIES")
    fi

    echo "Running filter_all Tongyi with get_document on planning ports $PLANNING_PORTS"
    echo "Neuron embedding endpoint: http://127.0.0.1:$EMBEDDING_PORT"
    "$PYTHON_BIN" search_agent/tongyi_client.py \
        --model "$MODEL" \
        --query "$QUERY_FILE" \
        --output-dir "$output_dir" \
        --cache-dir "$cache_dir" \
        --searcher-type faiss \
        --index-path "indexes/qwen3-embedding-8b/corpus.shard*.pkl" \
        --model-name "Qwen/Qwen3-Embedding-8B" \
        --normalize \
        --num-threads "$NUM_THREADS" \
        --embedding-base-url "http://127.0.0.1:$EMBEDDING_PORT" \
        --embedding-timeout 60 \
        --max-length 1024 \
        --planning-ports "$PLANNING_PORTS" \
        --planning-endpoint-capacity "$PLANNING_ENDPOINT_CAPACITY" \
        --snippet-max-tokens 512 \
        --k 5 \
        --document-chunk-tokens "$DOCUMENT_CHUNK_TOKENS" \
        --get-document \
        --port "$PORT" \
        --qrel-evidence-path "$QREL_EVIDENCE_FILE" \
        --qrel-golds-path "$QREL_GOLDS_FILE" \
        --filter-all \
        "${max_query_args[@]}"
}

# Previous full-qrels filter-non-positive runner.
# run_tongyi() {
#     local variant="$1"
#     local output_dir

#             ;;

#
#     echo "Running $variant on full qrels with Neuron server at port $PORT"

#         --qrel-golds-path "$QREL_GOLDS_FILE" \
#         "${extra_args[@]}"
# }

start_tongyi_server

run_filter_all_tongyi

# for variant in $VARIANTS; do
#     run_tongyi "$variant"
# done

cleanup_pid "$TONGYI_PID"
TONGYI_PID=""

if [[ "$RUN_EVAL" == "1" ]]; then
    start_judge_server

    "$PYTHON_BIN" scripts_evaluation/evaluate_run.py \
        --input_dir "$RUN_ROOT/8qrel/$RUN_NAME" \
        --qrel_evidence "$QREL_EVIDENCE_FILE" \
        --model "$JUDGE_MODEL" \
        --judge-backend openai-compatible \
        --judge-base-urls "$JUDGE_BASE_URLS" \
        --judge-num-threads "$JUDGE_NUM_THREADS" \
        --batch_size "$EVAL_BATCH_SIZE"

    # for variant in $VARIANTS; do
    #     "$PYTHON_BIN" scripts_evaluation/evaluate_run.py \

1	"""Launch vLLM with a bounded NxD HLO compilation thread pool."""
2	
3	import concurrent.futures
4	import json
5	import os
6	import runpy
7	from pathlib import Path
8	
9	
10	DEFAULT_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS = 8
11	_original_engine_core_entrypoint = None
12	_original_kv_quantization_config_init = None
13	
14	
15	def get_compile_max_workers() -> int:
16	    raw_value = os.environ.get(
17	        "NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS", str(DEFAULT_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS)
18	    )
19	    try:
20	        max_workers = int(raw_value)
21	    except ValueError as exc:
22	        raise SystemExit("NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS must be a positive integer") from exc
23	    if max_workers < 1:
24	        raise SystemExit("NXD_COMPILE_MAX_WORKERS must be a positive integer")
25	    return max_workers
26	
27	
28	class _FuturesProxy:
29	    def __init__(self, default_max_workers: int) -> None:
30	        self.default_max_workers = default_max_workers
31	
32	    def ThreadPoolExecutor(self, max_workers=None, *args, **kwargs):
33	        if max_workers is None:
34	            max_workers = self.default_max_workers
35	        return concurrent.futures.ThreadPoolExecutor(
36	            max_workers=max_workers, *args, **kwargs
37	        )
38	
39	    def __getattr__(self, name):
40	        return getattr(concurrent.futures, name)
41	
42	
43	class _ConcurrentProxy:
44	    def __init__(self, default_max_workers: int) -> None:
45	        self.futures = _FuturesProxy(default_max_workers)
46	
47	
48	def limit_nxd_compile_workers(max_workers: int) -> None:
49	    from neuronx_distributed.trace import model_builder
50	
51	    # ModelBuilder creates an unbounded-by-workload executor. Replace only its
52	    # module reference so other vLLM thread pools keep their original defaults.
53	    model_builder.concurrent = _ConcurrentProxy(max_workers)
54	
55	
56	def normalize_kv_quant_dtype(kv_quant_config: dict) -> None:
57	    quant_dtype = kv_quant_config.get("quant_dtype")
58	    if isinstance(quant_dtype, str):
59	        import torch
60	
61	        try:
62	            dtype = getattr(torch, quant_dtype)
63	        except AttributeError as exc:
64	            raise ValueError(
65	                f"Unsupported KV-cache quantization dtype: {quant_dtype!r}"
66	            ) from exc
67	        if not isinstance(dtype, torch.dtype):
68	            raise ValueError(
69	                f"Unsupported KV-cache quantization dtype: {quant_dtype!r}"
70	            )
71	        kv_quant_config["quant_dtype"] = dtype
72	
73	    serialized_methods = [
74	        name
75	        for name in ("k_quant_method", "v_quant_method")
76	        if isinstance(kv_quant_config.get(name), dict)
77	    ]
78	    if not serialized_methods:
79	        return
80	
81	    from neuronx_distributed.quantization.quantization_config import (
82	        QuantizationType,
83	    )
84	
85	    for name in serialized_methods:
86	        kv_quant_config[name] = QuantizationType(kv_quant_config[name]["_value_"])
87	
88	
89	def _kv_quantization_config_init_with_torch_dtype(self, **kwargs):
90	    normalize_kv_quant_dtype(kwargs)
91	    return _original_kv_quantization_config_init(self, **kwargs)
92	
93	
94	def install_kv_quant_dtype_hook() -> None:
95	    global _original_kv_quantization_config_init
96	
97	    from neuronx_distributed.quantization.quantization_config import (
98	        KVQuantizationConfig,
99	    )
100	
101	    if (
102	        KVQuantizationConfig.__init__
103	        is _kv_quantization_config_init_with_torch_dtype
104	    ):
105	        return
106	    _original_kv_quantization_config_init = KVQuantizationConfig.__init__
107	    KVQuantizationConfig.__init__ = _kv_quantization_config_init_with_torch_dtype
108	
109	
110	def _signal_compile_only_complete(compiled_path: str) -> None:
111	    marker_value = os.environ.get("NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY_MARKER")
112	    if not marker_value:
113	        raise RuntimeError(
114	            "NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY_MARKER must be set when NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY=1"
115	        )
116	    marker = Path(marker_value)
117	    marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
118	    marker.write_text(f"{compiled_path}\n")
119	    raise SystemExit(0)
120	
121	
122	def _compiled_artifact_is_complete(compiled_path: str) -> bool:
123	    artifact_dir = Path(compiled_path)
124	    config_path = artifact_dir / "neuron_config.json"
125	    if not (artifact_dir / "model.pt").is_file() or not config_path.is_file():
126	        return False
127	
128	    config = json.loads(config_path.read_text()).get("neuron_config", {})
129	    if not config.get("save_sharded_checkpoint", False):
130	        return True
131	
132	    world_size = int(config.get("world_size", 0))
133	    return world_size > 0 and all(
134	        (
135	            artifact_dir
136	            / "weights"
137	            / f"tp{rank}_sharded_checkpoint.safetensors"
138	        ).is_file()
139	        for rank in range(world_size)
140	    )
141	
142	
143	def _compile_model_without_loading(
144	    application, model_path, neuronx_model_cls, config, compiled_path
145	):
146	    application.model = neuronx_model_cls(model_path, config)
147	    if config.neuron_config.quantized:
148	        neuronx_model_cls.save_quantized_state_dict(model_path, config)
149	    application.model.compile(compiled_path)
150	    _signal_compile_only_complete(compiled_path)
151	
152	
153	def _reuse_compiled_model_without_loading(
154	    application, compiled_path, neuronx_model_cls, kwargs
155	):
156	    if not _compiled_artifact_is_complete(compiled_path):
157	        raise FileNotFoundError(f"Incomplete compiled artifacts at {compiled_path}")
158	    _signal_compile_only_complete(compiled_path)
159	
160	
161	def install_compile_only_hook() -> None:
162	    if os.environ.get("NEURON_COMPILE_ONLY", "0") != "1":
163	        return
164	
165	    from vllm_neuron.worker.neuronx_distributed_model_loader import NeuronModelBase
166	
167	    NeuronModelBase._compile_and_load_model = _compile_model_without_loading
168	    NeuronModelBase._load_compiled_model = _reuse_compiled_model_without_loading
169	
170	
171	def _run_with_limited_nxd_workers(target, *args, **kwargs):
172	    max_workers = get_compile_max_workers()
173	    limit_nxd_compile_workers(max_workers)
174	    install_kv_quant_dtype_hook()
175	    install_compile_only_hook()
176	    print(f"NxD HLO compile workers in EngineCore: {max_workers}", flush=True)
177	    return target(*args, **kwargs)
178	
179	
180	def _run_engine_core_with_limited_nxd_workers(*args, **kwargs):
181	    target = _original_engine_core_entrypoint
182	    if target is None:
183	        from vllm.v1.engine.core import EngineCoreProc
184	
185	        target = EngineCoreProc.run_engine_core
186	    return _run_with_limited_nxd_workers(target, *args, **kwargs)
187	
188	
189	def install_engine_core_worker_hook() -> None:
190	    global _original_engine_core_entrypoint
191	
192	    from vllm.v1.engine.core import EngineCoreProc
193	
194	    if EngineCoreProc.run_engine_core is _run_engine_core_with_limited_nxd_workers:
195	        return
196	    _original_engine_core_entrypoint = EngineCoreProc.run_engine_core
197	    EngineCoreProc.run_engine_core = staticmethod(
198	        _run_engine_core_with_limited_nxd_workers
199	    )
200	
201	
202	def main() -> None:
203	    max_workers = get_compile_max_workers()
204	    limit_nxd_compile_workers(max_workers)
205	    install_engine_core_worker_hook()
206	    print(f"NxD HLO compile workers: {max_workers}", flush=True)
207	    runpy.run_module("vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server", run_name="__main__")
208	
209	
210	if __name__ == "__main__":
211	    main()
212

1	"""HTTP microbatch service for a statically compiled Qwen3 Neuron embedder."""
2	
3	import argparse
4	import asyncio
5	import time
6	from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor
7	from contextlib import asynccontextmanager
8	from dataclasses import dataclass
9	from typing import Callable
10	
11	import torch
12	import torch.nn.functional as F
13	from fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException
14	from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
15	
16	
17	class EmbeddingInputError(ValueError):
18	    pass
19	
20	
21	@dataclass
22	class _WorkItem:
23	    text: str
24	    future: asyncio.Future
25	    enqueued_at: float
26	
27	
28	class StaticBatchEmbedder:
29	    def __init__(
30	        self,
31	        infer_batch: Callable[[list[str]], list[list[float]]],
32	        batch_size: int = 2,
33	        wait_ms: float = 5.0,
34	    ) -> None:
35	        if batch_size != 2:
36	            raise ValueError("the compiled embedding profile requires batch_size=2")
37	        self.infer_batch = infer_batch
38	        self.batch_size = batch_size
39	        self.wait_seconds = wait_ms / 1000
40	        self.queue: asyncio.Queue[_WorkItem] = asyncio.Queue()
41	        self._runner: asyncio.Task | None = None
42	        self._executor: ThreadPoolExecutor | None = None
43	        self._started_at = time.perf_counter()
44	        self._submitted_requests = 0
45	        self._resolved_requests = 0
46	        self._batches = 0
47	        self._duplicated_slots = 0
48	        self._queue_wait_seconds = 0.0
49	        self._inference_busy_seconds = 0.0
50	
51	    async def start(self) -> None:
52	        if self._runner is None:
53	            self._executor = ThreadPoolExecutor(
54	                max_workers=1,
55	                thread_name_prefix="neuron-embed",
56	            )
57	            self._runner = asyncio.create_task(self._run())
58	
59	    async def stop(self) -> None:
60	        if self._runner is not None:
61	            self._runner.cancel()
62	            try:
63	                await self._runner
64	            except asyncio.CancelledError:
65	                pass
66	            self._runner = None
67	        if self._executor is not None:
68	            # The runner is cancelled only between batches or after the current
69	            # synchronous inference has completed. Shut down its dedicated
70	            # worker explicitly so FastAPI/uvicorn can exit without retaining
71	            # an asyncio default-executor thread.
72	            self._executor.shutdown(wait=True, cancel_futures=True)
73	            self._executor = None
74	
75	    async def embed(self, texts: list[str]) -> list[list[float]]:
76	        if not texts:
77	            raise EmbeddingInputError("texts must not be empty")
78	        loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
79	        futures = []
80	        enqueued_at = time.perf_counter()
81	        for text in texts:
82	            future = loop.create_future()
83	            futures.append(future)
84	            await self.queue.put(
85	                _WorkItem(text=text, future=future, enqueued_at=enqueued_at)
86	            )
87	        self._submitted_requests += len(futures)
88	        return await asyncio.gather(*futures)
89	
90	    def metrics(self) -> dict[str, float | int]:
91	        """Return process-lifetime batcher timings, not device MFU."""
92	        uptime_seconds = time.perf_counter() - self._started_at
93	        busy_duty_percent = (
94	            100 * self._inference_busy_seconds / uptime_seconds
95	            if uptime_seconds > 0
96	            else 0.0
97	        )
98	        return {
99	            "uptime_seconds": uptime_seconds,
100	            "submitted_requests": self._submitted_requests,
101	            "resolved_requests": self._resolved_requests,
102	            "batches": self._batches,
103	            "duplicated_slots": self._duplicated_slots,
104	            "queue_wait_seconds": self._queue_wait_seconds,
105	            "inference_busy_seconds": self._inference_busy_seconds,
106	            "batcher_busy_duty_percent": busy_duty_percent,
107	            "queue_depth": self.queue.qsize(),
108	        }
109	
110	    async def _run(self) -> None:
111	        while True:
112	            first = await self.queue.get()
113	            items = [first]
114	            deadline = asyncio.get_running_loop().time() + self.wait_seconds
115	            while len(items) < self.batch_size:
116	                remaining = deadline - asyncio.get_running_loop().time()
117	                if remaining <= 0:
118	                    break
119	                try:
120	                    items.append(await asyncio.wait_for(self.queue.get(), remaining))
121	                except asyncio.TimeoutError:
122	                    break
123	
124	            batch_texts = [item.text for item in items]
125	            if len(batch_texts) == 1:
126	                batch_texts.append(batch_texts[0])
127	                self._duplicated_slots += 1
128	
129	            inference_start = time.perf_counter()
130	            self._queue_wait_seconds += sum(
131	                inference_start - item.enqueued_at for item in items
132	            )
133	            try:
134	                executor = self._executor
135	                if executor is None:
136	                    raise RuntimeError("embedding batcher stopped while a batch was running")
137	                loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
138	                embeddings = await loop.run_in_executor(
139	                    executor,
140	                    self.infer_batch,
141	                    batch_texts,
142	                )
143	                if len(embeddings) != self.batch_size:
144	                    raise RuntimeError(
145	                        f"embedding model returned {len(embeddings)} rows; "
146	                        f"expected {self.batch_size}"
147	                    )
148	                for item, embedding in zip(items, embeddings):
149	                        if not item.future.cancelled():
150	                            item.future.set_result(embedding)
151	                self._resolved_requests += len(items)
152	            except Exception as exc:
153	                for item in items:
154	                        if not item.future.cancelled():
155	                            item.future.set_exception(exc)
156	                self._resolved_requests += len(items)
157	            finally:
158	                self._inference_busy_seconds += time.perf_counter() - inference_start
159	                self._batches += 1
160	                for _ in items:
161	                    self.queue.task_done()
162	
163	
164	class NeuronEmbeddingModel:
165	    def __init__(
166	        self,
